name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is a story about the Missouri I grew up in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
...and why Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas.
I know it’s Saturday but I wanted to take a moment to share a story with you about the Missouri I grew up in — and why Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it. **Will you please let me explain?**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38518?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38517?refcode=em20231007-3939&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for all your help,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231007-3939-footer&t=14&refcode2=3939_614464_hSuoHJ&akid=3939%2E614464%2EhSuoHJ)**

[**I’m reaching out because our country is in grave trouble.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d0be45bed6644ec6977cddabef644c8b&_e=-1z7vJ0DMLs6tPP27R8VQg0sx5jJW7GyB7CGRaSnQkGcQvwLlrQSVdBn9AISv-H40NcYMfbC46Cu4Y3qPGG6pwhSyRDUK6L2DsalTS2oJue4_cW5iW0dA-Tg25GjGmrnIGZBszxCJw_8B87EI6kfFDQmFaHwyiBNP8DYuijpXIOGGS9KIjUtalZjXznKLKo-371jGMpNO4ke2YmpXrigHOaYUE9qc_965BaPpoCqsl1hnKt1MlJHQ4m1K5-jxzOEl8mIW_yL5ke6B6FpeccOjfO9f4N8TH3MdrzYxX-e2jT64xktEY7abjDSTi6sEDsjr8ZQXs18oJ1HwINRGqfb_lVTCeYyM_t2Tum1Fnqh0o2RPOOW4B6mG1DuhFczN1W8Qvkdh8csXR_iC-G_BN60BPPN4Uu_aSYycQizhMM4QdE%3D)

_We need a Majority to pass the America First agenda._ I’m counting on you to help Republicans take back the Senate with a donation of just $35.

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: mic drop...
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

We just finished our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ Tour stop in Ohio, and already we’re seeing more and more inspired pro-life activists pushing back against the Abortion Lobby!

In fact, our friends at one organization – _Protect Women Cincinnati_ – has produced some incredible ads that are sure to incise the Abortion Lobby for exposing the TRUTH about the upcoming pro-abortion amendment, _Issue 1_ , slated for a vote on November 7th.

One ad shows an Ohio attorney completely dismantling the extreme language in the upcoming referendum that would all but enshrine abortion into the Ohio constitution.

**_You can watch the ad by clicking on the link below_.**

**[After you do, would you please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so we can spread these digital ads far and wide, especially to young people, across the state of Ohio](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-y/)?**

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-j/)
The fact is, if passed, Ohio’s radical abortion referendum would:

******* Enshrine abortion-on-demand in Ohio’s state Constitution throughout all nine months of a pregnancy;

******* Allow abortionists to commit abortions on pregnant minors without parents knowing anything about it; and

******* Allow surgeons to mutilate the bodies of minors with sex change surgeries and allow Planned Parenthood to dispense hormone treatment to these same minors with zero parental involvement. [](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-i/)
**_But sadly, many people in Ohio – _even many pro-lifers_ – don’t understand what’s at stake_!**

In fact, according to a poll I just read from a well-known Republican pollster, one-quarter of those people who are planning on voting for Ohio _Issue 1_ call themselves pro-life!

That just proves how the media and the Abortion Lobby are pulling the wool over people’s eyes.

They know whichever side wins this fight will have a head full of steam heading into 2024.

So Pro-Life Friend, it’s vital that we get these pro-life messages out across Ohio before the November 7th vote on _Issue 1_ , so it’s crucial that I have your full support!

Ohio is supposedly going to be a “swing state” in 2024, but we can’t afford to let the Buckeye State move even **_ONE INCH_** closer to President Joe Biden’s radical abortion-on-demand agenda.

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-d/)
**[So, please consider making a contribution to _Students for Life Action_ today to help us](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-h/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

**[Donate to _Students for Life Action_ <<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-svhrhl-duchtdja-k/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

clean_body: Dear Pro-Life Friend, We just finished our “Stop Abortion Extremism” Tour stop in Ohio, and already we’re seeing more and more inspired pro-life activists pushing back against the Abortion Lobby! In fact, our friends at one organization – Protect Women Cincinnati – has produced some incredible ads that are sure to incise the Abortion Lobby for exposing the TRUTH about the upcoming pro-abortion amendment, Issue 1 , slated for a vote on November 7th. One ad shows an Ohio attorney completely dismantling the extreme language in the upcoming referendum that would all but enshrine abortion into the Ohio constitution. You can watch the ad by clicking on the link below. ? The fact is, if passed, Ohio’s radical abortion referendum would: ***** Enshrine abortion-on-demand in Ohio’s state Constitution throughout all nine months of a pregnancy; *** Allow abortionists to commit abortions on pregnant minors without parents knowing anything about it; and *** Allow surgeons to mutilate the bodies of minors with sex change surgeries and allow Planned Parenthood to dispense hormone treatment to these same minors with zero parental involvement. But sadly, many people in Ohio – even many pro-lifers – don’t understand what’s at stake! In fact, according to a poll I just read from a well-known Republican pollster, one-quarter of those people who are planning on voting for Ohio Issue 1 call themselves pro-life! That just proves how the media and the Abortion Lobby are pulling the wool over people’s eyes. They know whichever side wins this fight will have a head full of steam heading into 2024. So Pro-Life Friend, it’s vital that we get these pro-life messages out across Ohio before the November 7th vote on Issue 1 , so it’s crucial that I have your full support! Ohio is supposedly going to be a “swing state” in 2024, but we can’t afford to let the Buckeye State move even ONE INCH closer to President Joe Biden’s radical abortion-on-demand agenda. ! Thank you for everything you do for Life. For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. subject: ‘Pro-Censorship Agenda’: California Keeps Triggering Lawsuits Over Alleged First Amendment Violations
body:
And JENNY BETH MARTIN: Democrats Are Finally Changing Their Tune On Biden’s Border Disaster

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuu6841br1215qeos8158bddego0ho7k0i17qapo_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctimaor0c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziocf6mobpdtc48jgbmas2eqvioerp2qbv3sa4mo_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctimaor0c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

subject: Franklin Graham just broke his silence on Trump

body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can’t stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They’re enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they’ll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **
[**So today we’re PLEADING for every conservative reading this message to add their name and stand with us against the WORST political Witch Hunt in American history.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqlf0cqmk2beut0ci4vqh39me5jdhbiu1eq8og5o_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cph2bs)

name: Mark Robinson
subject: All Glory to God
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
If it is His will for me to be, it will be!

| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2memmcod42knfg3k2nij8sq3pt7na77mel4va8_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs) |
Friend,

My father was an abusive alcoholic that beat my mother, but he was still my father & he provided for us.

When he died, my mother took a job taking care of other peoples' kids to provide for her own and to make sure that my siblings and I had a childhood.

Woke liberals will tell you that such an upbringing makes me a Democrat.

**But no matter what the woke media and liberal talking heads tell you, it is my faith in God that has made me the man I am today.

It is my faith in God that guided me to free myself from the left's welfare plantation & achieve the American Dream. **

My story is a success story & according to Joe Biden & Kamala Harris- black people can't succeed in America without their help.

Who I am & what I represent destroys the foundation of the Democratic party that race, gender, and economic status determine who we are as Americans.

Trust me- nothing gets the blood of a Democrat boiling more than beating them at their own game.

You should have seen how much they spent, and what they did to me when I humiliated them the first time back in 2020 by becoming the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

And now that I'm running for Governor- there is no way they're going to let me, a REPUBLICAN, become the first black man to hold that office either.

Joe Biden & Kamala Harris are already campaigning against me. They're spending millions to make an example out of me- to punish me.

_**That 's why I'm humbly asking YOU for help today & I hope you won't get mad at me for it.

Will you chip in a few bucks to ensure we have what it takes to hold the line against the Democrats and stop their millionaire donors from buying this race?**_
| [**CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjtbkp09e2hej7ltr8jrsk8vfm27b0nm9ogq2mb8_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs)
---

Folks like you who step up to meet our challenges head on are & always will be the backbone of American greatness. You are what makes America Great & this campaign will be no different.

Thank YOU!

-Mark Robinson

|

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zorco0j1jfdc5fgla6mk5l6pmjdh49q1rojlo4n8_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6qgaer13jd0jc6r50hl4hqngp8heekb6ohi6b7o_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpj2utq3rk0qomoodla34kn3h1mone5l60mb0tg0_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1vaces873dl10h61gb9tsnhe7dkc2ip25oq7cj8_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt46rtk9rctcdpteircfudtqmedh2evjnoa8qlc0_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctim9oj6cdh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

subject: “Amazon’s Secret Program” Keeps Going Up, Where Are You?
body:

| **“Amazon’s Secret Program” Keeps Going Up, Where Are You?** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z2qI2mbUE%2fKx6cxzonw2Hg&sysid=1) Since 2005, Amazon’s “royalties” have gone on a tear... _Business Insider_ says that depending on the amount invested, this type of investment could provide **“enough money to live off of each year, without having any other retirement plan...”** It’s easy to see why... name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
My first vote as a member of Congress was to reject the certification of the 2020 election.

| | _**Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.**_ This President Trump’s top ally, Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I’m sure you get a lot of texts from fake “conservatives” who claim to be Trump supporters.
I’m sure you get a ton of texts that question your loyalty to our country if you don’t donate.
This might be the 20th email you’ve gotten in the last 24 hours, but I can that this isn’t one of those messages.
_**My first vote in Congress was to reject the certification of the RIGGED 2020 election, and I was the FIRST member of Congress to proudly endorse President Trump for 2024.**_
The DC Swamp that hates your guts hates mine even more.
Democrats have raised $37 million to wipe out every Trump Republican.
[**So today I’m humbly asking for you to chip in just $10 before the day ends.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfjh5fu7c737cai4l78d5pidk2ckt9ihfqrqv6m8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs)

I won’t blame you if you can’t donate.
But right now, your support is our only chance to turn this country around.
Ronny

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Will you read this?
body:
State of the race as of 10/07/23

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zane9q2bscl4h2jaq3h75gsr8rmunnugvi46k9q8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs)
---

Friend, have you seen the news?

Our momentum has never been higher.

The polls speak for themselves on how much ground we've gained since the debates.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in New Hampshire polls.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in South Carolina polls.

I've _**DOUBLED**_ my support in Iowa polls.

And nationally, I'm proving I'm the only candidate who can _**DEFEAT**_ Biden and Harris.

While this is all great news, we've still got a lot to do. We've got to continue to keep our heads down, work hard, and earn every vote in order to **WIN!**

_That 's why I need your help today. _

**[Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmk4bclhsnnmmtvnkojhh741fehe3lk3o6c9l5l0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?")**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z26cn88rgulgrg9s5kq9rmps7lqalt2cr4a31jg8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs)
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z14vs4nook3rsbkbvjtgqn1iljc859tjrgll33mo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs)
---

**The bottom line is:** These polls are a great reflection of the progress our campaign is making and how _**YOUR**_ support is making a difference.

But, it also means, if we keep up the hard work, we _**WILL**_ surge to the top!

**[Will you step up with a generous donation of $20.24 or more today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkv2iu7rjvu2ausnv0tidvf2rcpjfgtdcmskvnlo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "Will you step up with a generous donation of $20.24 or more today?")**

Every moment and every dollar counts. Everything we do gets us one step closer to victory.

With the first votes in Iowa taking place in just 100 days, and New Hampshire heading to the polls shortly after, we must keep our eye on the prize.

**[Will you pitch in today to help me get my message out to every American and win the fight for our country's future?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgk42eqcjqfu6r747onhc6na4mlpnl9hilisg8to_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "Will you pitch in today to help me get my message out to every American and win the fight for our country’s future?")**

Thank you for your support.

---
My very best,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc2ipv7uchquain7gbdu3obk7ahf1l41o7q03g80_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs)

Nikki Haley

---

---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd54ci5ilreb4i7vjg9qsmm1jlkd2kqeb019aug0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoko54kbnogrgeoj9pido7kmjn7rlrbodd9i2ft0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zln0clgknhn2o8it75pq7rr2nfbbspc83ae7e6m0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o71cph2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpeetpk7m1lldnd8hehk3n8ono4u3i5b0er6e6jg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o76cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgqbgsd4mcabugh6kscd095ftkmf03stpdtv46m0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o76cth2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdcm6ho1rn8dd1u4fjvgvk0d8133ug6v2pn79o20_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o76cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zse7iul1d9lbc6sbknd0uh5opf129v4nu6oqilpg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o76cth2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqr9kam2vamr5f5d284odlstii2g8r2iij6b74r0_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm4o76cth2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Friend, have you seen the news?

Our momentum has never been higher.

The polls speak for themselves on how much ground we've gained since the debates.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in New Hampshire polls.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in South Carolina polls.

I've _**DOUBLED**_ my support in Iowa polls.

And nationally, I'm proving I'm the only candidate who can _**DEFEAT**_ Biden and Harris.

While this is all great news, we've still got a lot to do. We've got to continue to keep our heads down, work hard, and earn every vote in order to **WIN!**

_That 's why I need your help today. _

**[Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z75c3d0pk8m5f8vf2mnaa40vb4dnpqe36ua8tjbo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?")**

---

**The bottom line is:** These polls are a great reflection of the progress our campaign is making and how _**YOUR**_ support is making a difference.

But, it also means, if we keep up the hard work, we _**WILL**_ surge to the top!

**[Will you step up with a generous donation of $20.24 or more today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z169q6lqakcp4er3a03j039bi20ia7gd6jjde750_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you step up with a generous donation of $20.24 or more today?")**

Every moment and every dollar counts. Everything we do gets us one step closer to victory.

With the first votes in Iowa taking place in just 100 days, and New Hampshire heading to the polls shortly after, we must keep our eye on the prize.

**[Will you pitch in today to help me get my message out to every American and win the fight for our country's future?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zic7n5m5ppqjqdtjhdcrgco2ud7l7meglc8lh580_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you pitch in today to help me get my message out to every American and win the fight for our country’s future?")**

Thank you for your support.

My very best,

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze8jns59k58jnh3e5p7amr56liihrjld1lak6ejg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgxLWMwNTEyZjE3ZjdiMjQ1ZGFhM2ViN2QxOTQxMmJhMDZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfTExPNDM0NjIifQ/NLXxxgsLKXD9uzo15KGElQ)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgxLWMwNTEyZjE3ZjdiMjQ1ZGFhM2ViN2QxOTQxMmJhMDZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfTExPNDM0NjIifQ/BYEsDg1gO_yfO42hSl3fqA)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgxLWMwNTEyZjE3ZjdiMjQ1ZGFhM2ViN2QxOTQxMmJhMDZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfTExPNDM0NjIifQ/vMTdAzA4onaLHhNyDd-BIA)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgxLWMwNTEyZjE3ZjdiMjQ1ZGFhM2ViN2QxOTQxMmJhMDZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfTExPNDM0NjIifQ/21pd85GHLxHMqeiFykuYcA)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjgxLWMwNTEyZjE3ZjdiMjQ1ZGFhM2ViN2QxOTQxMmJhMDZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/xKYWRvwopuy9u8kDgeQDNg) to unsubscribe.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvdfmi3bt7pbgqqicckujgmfv0rf1gnricutnvdg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs). Friend, have you seen the news?

Our momentum has never been higher.

The polls speak for themselves on how much ground we've gained since the debates.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in New Hampshire polls.

I'm in _**SECOND PLACE**_ in South Carolina polls.

I've _**DOUBLED**_ my support in Iowa polls.

And nationally, I'm proving I'm the only candidate who can _**DEFEAT**_ Biden and Harris.

While this is all great news, we've still got a lot to do. We've got to continue to keep our heads down, work hard, and earn every vote in order to **WIN!**

_That 's why I need your help today. _

**[Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zav8bsb06e7upcf5ari3atbuimcekhudtm9g49qo_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign, spread my message far and wide, and WIN the fight for our future?")**

**The bottom line is:** These polls are a great reflection of the progress our campaign is making and how _**YOUR**_ support is making a difference.

But, it also means, if we keep up the hard work, we _**WILL**_ surge to the top!

Thank you for your support.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeh3b0n6t7vejtnggql9as8b2b7ba839gi3vj2mg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51psftro53ccbi55erdp7hbcv79a19josl5p7ag_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbnnbbo6gjmjquqh1ag43ecbnot1dpoknf2cgaq8_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl3n3oon1pg3gbmf526ufqbi42i58rmm93jomsg_rp22sh2s8i66p73cthm6ob1chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
My first vote as a member of Congress was to reject the certification of the 2020 election.

| | _**Steve Bannon: There’s very few people closer to Trump than Admiral Ronny Jackson.**_ This President Trump’s top ally, Congressman Ronny Jackson.
I’m sure you get a lot of texts from fake “conservatives” who claim to be Trump supporters.
I’m sure you get a ton of texts that question your loyalty to our country if you don’t donate.
This might be the 20th email you’ve gotten in the last 24 hours, but I can that this isn’t one of those messages.
_**My first vote in Congress was to reject the certification of the RIGGED 2020 election, and I was the FIRST member of Congress to proudly endorse President Trump for 2024.**_
The DC Swamp that hates your guts hates mine even more.
Democrats have raised $37 million to wipe out every Trump Republican.
[**So today I’m humbly asking for you to chip in just $10 before the day ends.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24746%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RlgigjYhzE1sv1vOGOUZ%2bA&sysid=1)

---

---
I won’t blame you if you can’t donate.
But right now, your support is our only chance to turn this country around.
Ronny

The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7r3sm07lhdkaj5qap0cou96nrn0i1lg4v6jndi8_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctjm0o36c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr44e1fj5a7mrhfa74lmfgnpl7h8aeaeng9gcu70_rp22sh2s8i66p73ctjm0o36c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

subject: Franklin Graham just broke his silence on Trump

body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

subject: Promise Kept
body:
When I say something, I mean it.

| | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eececec8871430ca0d9276d658bf63f&_e=aSMKZDONlEuQnxIJ-ux7VESHK_zjMfmTNDb9jwYRJqGwyStoJdAxKMqckWSp0NBaIJzSoiUNF4qyZFV9Dq68Q-aisd_-YNNQ_j-9JyS0eA2hVHIRUegZ2FMwq6lnHHrYjScZf5dA4rTa2OjSKhdbzSwRWWYSjBusluNHOwaMhK2FcJVKME7WkR288gv9pwlitGg1hheaEOuT1MDht5IX3Y5FqLMgnQ7_pbfhZFTLdaYMVXyTvRahXOhqlQs9L4Smobx9XAsJfpU52956QfcZbaROZpDZZVe_9S9Rd-6LRoR3Fisc5ERXFIPVo6lBfBph)
---
Friend, If this country is going down, I'm going down FIGHTING. I don't care if that's fighting Republicans, Democrats, the UniParty, the Leadership, the PACs, the Lobbyists.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eececec8871430ca0d9276d658bf63f&_e=aSMKZDONlEuQnxIJ-ux7VESHK_zjMfmTNDb9jwYRJqGwyStoJdAxKMqckWSp0NBaIJzSoiUNF4qyZFV9Dq68Q-aisd_-YNNQ_j-9JyS0eA2hVHIRUegZ2FMwq6lnHHrYjScZf5dA4rTa2OjSKhdbzQT7hq-qvBU4R9TdkycXltYD2II_t0jKBlVAx_vw3a_cYFTmmEQ20BF1paQaxT8TXQuk1sVuMglKmx490gI8DxoCl6tgGBtAqTD-TayyglYO3n-2QpcmmYlf5hM0FDy20y7HYtdPFcPGh3I3MXyyso0GXXG8nW70UaX0oNF1rVXB)
---
I've been in Congress for 7 years and we don't have a budget. We haven't had one in 30 years.
**No wonder we 're $33 TRILLION DOLLARS IN DEBT!!**
I represent my constituents in Washington, nobody else, and when I make a promise, I keep it.
The Swamp doesn't want anything to change and they are plotting to expel me for standing up to them and exposing them for the world to see.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eececec8871430ca0d9276d658bf63f&_e=aSMKZDONlEuQnxIJ-ux7VESHK_zjMfmTNDb9jwYRJqGwyStoJdAxKMqckWSp0NBaIJzSoiUNF4qyZFV9Dq68Q-aisd_-YNNQ_j-9JyS0eA2hVHIRUegZ2FMwq6lnHHrYjScZf5dA4rTa2OjSKhdbzSvQ2TrDj6_Z8H1Wz2pTa70Y0LDfHif-PJdDYRFFzURnR0OVvzmc_brykcZKHNB9gkefGTJ1wPAdHRTQ9bE9D6HSdwlMr2N-b55mtOwI85xUEeooCKaBi7fBuqtP014tWAbtUQFguVbPajVByJAYO5DuI8lYn0SaUW3Br3hSiqJw)
---
[**I urgently need help fighting back against this sinister plot, and I fear that if we fail, nobody in Congress will stand up to the Swamp for a generation.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eececec8871430ca0d9276d658bf63f&_e=aSMKZDONlEuQnxIJ-ux7VESHK_zjMfmTNDb9jwYRJqGwyStoJdAxKMqckWSp0NBaIJzSoiUNF4qyZFV9Dq68Q-aisd_-YNNQ_j-9JyS0eA2hVHIRUegZ2FMwq6lnHHrYjScZf5dA4rTa2OjSKhdbzXNKyjdVS1a0HIyZWrBF9IWOdUeNXEIEkF47bxe9hF0h5rNwBAEzEozKOSpS54yR4203dJAdOuZC7mbuM9gqsx5L4KMR3AMhvwSXeGKZSur85VnnHBzoX3GMhTPAqpGYFa3r4uUEfCEgmRgwwql2ddcfWrkLG2VmLm5aFHoz5uyr)
_We don 't have a generation. _
We must take decisive action to stop our country from careening off the cliff of ruin immediately.
**[If you 're with me, I'd be humbled to have your generous support, even $10 makes a difference.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5eececec8871430ca0d9276d658bf63f&_e=aSMKZDONlEuQnxIJ-ux7VESHK_zjMfmTNDb9jwYRJqGwyStoJdAxKMqckWSp0NBaIJzSoiUNF4qyZFV9Dq68Q-aisd_-YNNQ_j-9JyS0eA2hVHIRUegZ2FMwq6lnHHrYjScZf5dA4rTa2OjSKhdbzbKSq6G2WZ96UiFoD27s4lW_qbDtVl_6KzeJiJIvuu2_mCqgVzC15o2AO4765D4Uk7NgLFiizbIpPGbVndbe5_lOLXMJ-hNomU0ukckoaefLhE1miqQCVXtYFOL2h2pjT4DQHHbleXqcUKiVl0a3fLaXNOOCEKgb0XLHFiLvob-m)** Thanks, Matt Gaetz

subject: Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36affc9bc9e547f18110dafe266109d0&_e=2EB1O0iMiBrNFo8Fi35s2MkOGkRTFwCUnLEjxpYYvDcbZZQ_Z2MVkw5Xbi3WQ196y5ykdKeM52LPJYMExzo-lmkLwny47M93NpJ02yGz2wYr9Gt-6t0GTdP60nYWwPCoQvc1FFEe_HZHtZgmwXJm-42GAzWqhawIn6iqywyH7ouVrrQttUB4SipHOkpu8P3M3VEtj-2q6YNedSjurYIkKZ7G5udSuiJRNOUa_IZyvWuNr0r2_m6oedtSTgBRmEoCi5o7W8ckAmywmzEn0XXcK-Nvxd0_vy021h9jaLby3LShIbk45Gx1HwgEMyaeX7frVlJQKfzahO5mJHzESPs_h_XwhKzqWSgb8jDOQjmI_KTSUjwyvucNdMOxwnLO6ISJLL4GYZ1nxeeOSYdKC1Ki8vm-lxGyeTCztekswJu0sMKccmxs9Vs9jIjTwban30yXWeJTWXRvKOsAgov9yIKD87LEknXHBl7L0mfGBlpbtxM%3D)

Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.

Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

I was confident that more Americans who are TIRED of seeing career politicians destroy our country would have stepped up. But it hasn't happened yet.

Friend, this is Frank LaRose - **Green Beret & strong Christian conservative. I just announced my candidacy for the most IMPORTANT Senate race in the country.**

I reached out recently humbly asking for YOUR support as I work to fire Biden's personal puppet & 47-year politician, Sherrod Brown, & **help the Republican Party take back the Senate.**

Biden & Democrats are counting on you to ignore this race. They can't stand the fact that I'm a proud Christian conservative & veteran, and they're raising millions to silence my announcement.

People think they have to write huge checks to make a difference. But I'm here to tell you that every last dollar counts - _even just $10 or $20 bucks goes a long way._

**[So, I'm humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36affc9bc9e547f18110dafe266109d0&_e=2EB1O0iMiBrNFo8Fi35s2MkOGkRTFwCUnLEjxpYYvDcbZZQ_Z2MVkw5Xbi3WQ196y5ykdKeM52LPJYMExzo-lmkLwny47M93NpJ02yGz2wYr9Gt-6t0GTdP60nYWwPCoQvc1FFEe_HZHtZgmwXJm-42GAzWqhawIn6iqywyH7ouVrrQttUB4SipHOkpu8P3M3VEtj-2q6YNedSjurYIkKZ7G5udSuiJRNOUa_IZyvWuNr0r2_m6oedtSTgBRmEoCi5o7W8ckAmywmzEn0XXcK-Nvxd0_vy021h9jaLby3LShIbk45Gx1HwgEMyaeX7frVlJQKfzahO5mJHzESPs_hyRV8ti6pMTyO_UgqcWx0YXZEu5dAeHyqTFcBR3QAiW3ivaePslNZELgeXyQD2RWSGFd2t0edPM9ZCiC1XjUrQrKML8586wfnuDJmCcGJKIdCbIo5p3mZQDBAmclIZ1ldld5AMXS2jjs6BezI_cuNPE%3D "So, I’m humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.")**

name: Faith Alerts
subject: Franklin Graham just broke his silence on Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46126ae4f7b4448aa0057a3025d3953&_e=fHXBxwhQyrsBExPLusXPaKim8oRVDSkwjZ7qTml0FU3gq5ztIN3Y48W2W85DH4IAAXbQ94zNgsslXCHEh1xWHFTFKuq2dVxeVoEl1vZOwXm7HJp-5X5e_wq8LXOOKbA_CVOzvyuR2xi-kRfiF0AYSVyw8_qLP7CkzpjpcQ1LYn7rgPtLWVbMb8YvaHqzMO2X62-GqNLTDhgoAHdLPrH6i9fWPbEfM3_6YM8N7xqV-2MaJOrG6O1Vrjpczzo9iVOJpSS0XF0XLaeO82Bs632TOUuePDSGgtiP3k9iaKmXjYE%3D). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a46126ae4f7b4448aa0057a3025d3953&_e=fHXBxwhQyrsBExPLusXPaKim8oRVDSkwjZ7qTml0FU3gq5ztIN3Y48W2W85DH4IAAXbQ94zNgsslXCHEh1xWHFTFKuq2dVxeVoEl1vZOwXm7HJp-5X5e_wq8LXOOKbA_CVOzvyuR2xi-kRfiF0AYSSiyNqVdMLAHGKCAzYov4t5vfzeMytmc2eBEqS1YG-lGS1TFYd_LUDad-luaoIbhedgI9cE4xEHphk54hOWOWSq03JxMR4KgSK3rFD0YJShqEbMDVwi1PfaSWL3msow7mp4_6qv1NLm9g0L4k3-qRjg%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24853%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jc5g8xy3Ypeay%2bgAPzt%2few&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24854%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZMGYcneaSd9addsRF8j2w&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24865%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zs639wHDWCOOzcOExLMCnA&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24866%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KKi8FwP6sVlesplR3SLBWQ&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24867%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H31DKoWwsGZ6ynSy6h7Rkw&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8475%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=NTMTMKzlyQq0QTt3Wc6nfg&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24868%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U7f51y4w9l3ly%2fcMg8pP%2fg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24869%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sspaGyFMFq7aOT2r%2bSpkYQ&sysid=1)_

**Then, consider this alarming development:** In a desperate move to divert our attention, Assembly Republicans, led by Speaker Robin Vos, are scheming by advancing a redistricting reform bill in bad faith. They're hoping we'll be blindsided. But we won't.
[**Let’s consider the gravity of the situation in Wisconsin:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71175144/431407154/1630309292?refcode=20231008_AOTL_F_WiReform_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllM2E5NGQ2LWM5NjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XNzGm40v7o-i-Xkbwd0yLPvqZwakeQjcI2GYPvv9K4g=)
The looming threat of Republican legislators impeaching Justice Protasiewicz is more than a local concern; it could set a precedent nationwide. Our momentum to safeguard fair representation must not waver.
[**Now, AB 415 emerges as a brazen power play.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71175145/431407155/1630309292?refcode=20231008_AOTL_F_WiReform_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllM2E5NGQ2LWM5NjUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XNzGm40v7o-i-Xkbwd0yLPvqZwakeQjcI2GYPvv9K4g=) Assembly Bill 415, conceived without input from the public, is a bad redistricting reform that keeps conservative politicians in charge. The bill lacks the safeguards of independent redistricting commissions and will simply fail to protect against extreme partisan gerrymandering. Make no mistake, this is nothing more than another gerrymandering scheme to maximize an illegitimate partisan advantage.
Let's expose the motives behind this maneuver and fight for transparency, not just for Wisconsin, but for every state where right-wing actors seek to impose anti-democratic agendas. **[Your donation to All On The Line today will amplify our efforts nationwide to end the gerrymandered interests of extreme politicians. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Rising gas prices
body:
The Shift WA team has been working to shift the political debate
in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade
providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed
to make a difference in your community.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

The governor's office and others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more... In case you missed it… Leave it to the local paper to put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon.
