However, the local paper takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit, pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue to Central Washington. name: Roger R. Ream, TFAS
subject: Download Rand Paul’s FREE eBook today!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
Friend, It's no secret that many young people don't understand the dangers of socialism.| | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyODEtNWMyMzQwMWFkZDNlNDU2ODk2ZDkyNjZlMzQ2NjIyYTQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8zcHJ3MHdxYjU0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9UkFOTzQzNDY1In0/wI258_wLDygnTQV8oac7pA)
---
Friend, Every day, the importance of our freedoms becomes ever more apparent.

Because unfortunately, socialism continues to grow in popularity among young people.
In no small part because they're completely unaware of its terrible track record. And that means it sounds perfect to many of America's youth.

Today, many American leaders who should know better continue to praise this ideology. Let's be clear: a future with socialism is not pretty. Countries that crush their free markets end up poorer. And they frequently fall prey to cruel dictatorships that ruin individual liberties as well.

That's why it's essential to learn why socialism doesn't work and why free markets do.

So Friend, we've decided to publish Senator Rand Paul's lecture on the importance of freedom and government restraint.

[](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyODEtNWMyMzQwMWFkZDNlNDU2ODk2ZDkyNjZlMzQ2NjIyYTQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8zcHJ3MHdxYjU0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9UkFOTzQzNDY1In0/3X5JRTT0sr5bH48SrzTRAw)| [**Click here for your free copy!**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyODEtNWMyMzQwMWFkZDNlNDU2ODk2ZDkyNjZlMzQ2NjIyYTQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8zcHJ3MHdxYjU0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9UkFOTzQzNDY1In0/1_A-cR_TnTbebhxVFy34kQ)
---

In _Capitalism, Socialism, and the Arguments for Liberty_ , the Kentucky senator makes a powerful case for free enterprise. He shows why small government principles are essential and criticizes both Republicans and Democrats for abandoning them.

And now, you can [get his eBook for FREE!](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyODEtNWMyMzQwMWFkZDNlNDU2ODk2ZDkyNjZlMzQ2NjIyYTQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8zcHJ3MHdxYjU0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9UkFOTzQzNDY1In0/qTBPgl53GqpcRTdZ3g4YbA)

That's right, free! We want everyone to understand just how important capitalism is to our prosperity and liberty.

If that sounds like something you want to understand, you'll love this book! Download it today.

It's clear that our country is being fooled. It's time to fight lies with the truth! Get your free copy of Senator Paul's lecture today and do just that!

subject: Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaRose for Senate
body:
Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5371cb525c9d4e589c51683c26c16a8e&_e=HkV8bTezpf0iRqCF22i_CM4586Nzd9xrp8Jfc-1srwIZZ7U1ldynRqLYUiMJdpZoTiIhjrbZJbzNW93rPaxbdvA_U_gLRX9JNuNijBcsr05mf_OqlwMIntBg6YCTJNK4jcxDHVORuEM2v4YCxorA63sPpPGR66DCyrQTziZWwPbw5mmJtHpaiAuv0zpfsagABclJ7Ag4jim_tPDjkFLpKgmkKIJE7lm_L4pnBW-oQPKirAMrKjeqd-6LuFvoafKOLbx27dUEWuK2nbqAO17Erm0FkPamkeWvNVD85rc8JmryIqYU3k4tHhpLDEK5yeiKKlAhY3d5Jd3CgGsNEdPVm2_63tmMVZgffN4Clv3fenU56VSskeadA9m00IG7NYPpFUqtoUw0ch2uB1zuJowK0_HTbqx0PZvtMJFstmw0lsRkxQkolCb1RyfxPkKM7ZuZo1cIAOXz51-1sDCRb38TIK3vkLitKAtkRGvvkv2nb7A%3D)

Maybe my words fell on deaf ears.

Maybe I just set my expectations too high.

I was confident that more Americans who are TIRED of seeing career politicians destroy our country would have stepped up. But it hasn't happened yet.

Friend, this is Frank LaRose - **Green Beret & strong Christian conservative. I just announced my candidacy for the most IMPORTANT Senate race in the country.**

I reached out recently humbly asking for YOUR support as I work to fire Biden's personal puppet & 47-year politician, Sherrod Brown, & **help the Republican Party take back the Senate.**

Biden & Democrats are counting on you to ignore this race. They can't stand the fact that I'm a proud Christian conservative & veteran, and they're raising millions to silence my announcement.

People think they have to write huge checks to make a difference. But I'm here to tell you that every last dollar counts - _even just $10 or $20 bucks goes a long way._

**[So, I'm humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5371cb525c9d4e589c51683c26c16a8e&_e=HkV8bTezpf0iRqCF22i_CM4586Nzd9xrp8Jfc-1srwIZZ7U1ldynRqLYUiMJdpZoTiIhjrbZJbzNW93rPaxbdvA_U_gLRX9JNuNijBcsr05mf_OqlwMIntBg6YCTJNK4jcxDHVORuEM2v4YCxorA63sPpPGR66DCyrQTziZWwPbw5mmJtHpaiAuv0zpfsagABclJ7Ag4jim_tPDjkFLpKgmkKIJE7lm_L4pnBW-oQPKirAMrKjeqd-6LuFvoafKOLbx27dUEWuK2nbqAO17Erm0FkPamkeWvNVD85rc8JmryIqYU3k4tHhpLDEK5yeiKKlAhY3d5Jd3CgGsNEdPVmxutaVh68kcypEGwJkgnIM-npQqga_2e3qw-NL6KPkeLLYVBfvIOFt0l3N0G-uxqj0Cup2hew2VjLldvRw7HbM6iLRwno2poa4Mo3WCNGyybACFdmR9lEYUokcMu_m-Gm0Pw3U5r-x7QImTDUhf9l6M%3D "So, I’m humbly asking you one LAST time today if you will become an official Day One Donor by chipping in just a few bucks to help me take back the Senate & turn our country around.")**

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: I’m (almost) at a loss for words...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83eee936-7d89-4b24-bef7-5bd7c94cd807/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter: President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!! I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [Please split a donation of $10 today between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54b9eb52-8e4e-4553-8b59-7fd177da0449/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T233a3ca4-1fcc-4eeb-96f3-207466c8c0e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter. When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress. Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows. The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!! And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement. In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden. Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics [Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8906d861-8d62-4bbd-bf14-ce7e876f04fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN $10 OR MORE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2f67509-7628-474d-9444-48c5904b4027/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon. There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few. There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country. [If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help fund our work. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0ee8ecc-baa5-40b7-99e6-9389829c7008/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2aecb193-b05f-43e9-94c7-b4c3b2b165e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee4c07b6-e637-466d-9242-7df2318971ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2ed46dc-04b2-4f83-bd88-c2f231b11572/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89289cf9-a3d5-4f1d-9dd9-e9fef6bed683/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
| | | Thanks for your support, Peter. Together, we will keep making the progress we deserve. David Hogg P.S. Me when we finally get the Office of Gun Violence Prevention 👇😊 [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85f1ce78-cabf-4b6d-95c0-4d022026dfc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e7ab2ad-23a6-4a75-ae73-dda1bd069bac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Promise Kept
body:
When I say something, I mean it.

| | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZfoDFr0YiajN9_Pc5sTMvBpK6mrh1FjWTg0y2HuXhheqOcn6xqBL4sDJ7pnS3qHqW0KeGXfHi2IbZ0GIxyayL92iWthAGxzYry2CCOICFrsPXUCr-SRxDS-qK7-YHcKFM9oY3ESP319CSZeUJUaxzfxFKjeDR6dmrdLo9GAIzklN)
---
Friend, If this country is going down, I'm going down FIGHTING. I don't care if that's fighting Republicans, Democrats, the UniParty, the Leadership, the PACs, the Lobbyists.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZfSuAQnuxjVKjYZcTbkqX6HTHxpkGvYQEg2iVQvYNlhvFoPtaGs_KdlkfSFcsHu5XSPekKgRr4Gja2EBBsx--NLSvDfPAMAaHJLfND9zj94_u7ovsM33cVfCDY_gbT3UQHyrm_xPxlOGQQimXJ3FDUDYj_COON9D-lsoPXWdggLZ)
---
I've been in Congress for 7 years and we don't have a budget. We haven't had one in 30 years.
**No wonder we 're $33 TRILLION DOLLARS IN DEBT!!**
I represent my constituents in Washington, nobody else, and when I make a promise, I keep it.
The Swamp doesn't want anything to change and they are plotting to expel me for standing up to them and exposing them for the world to see.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZRQh_ZJmB9fkrTcHiNZYkj-eap_Zva64Ul9OH7xxlr1IuS44Hh-rKegCwIEgq9L2R53d-uGkUld-XDXO5NA2QFN19cU-79wdC485Boq2umNeMIAt5uX9z_aljEd8-Z0M1ehtgqR7xx5vGnZ2nu4HQrMmhZ7ZS9VjoN64ECk35vOU)
---
[**I urgently need help fighting back against this sinister plot, and I fear that if we fail, nobody in Congress will stand up to the Swamp for a generation.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZdqMMnM8vjsWCBk4lW18QqMg4Gx9bvDewRyuE36UQ-fAQWp8iu49GhJM5Gjdfcg7lWVKoBF10vQIGTMaoGJZFQ2XxSkcVE3J3mNUoDlNgSRDvS73dgLIZNkBYXo1YrSPICKlavNj8xnbNY13IZN3QvvwxbQpCqF5HxA0qaPsS_j5)
_We don 't have a generation. _
We must take decisive action to stop our country from careening off the cliff of ruin immediately.
**[If you 're with me, I'd be humbled to have your generous support, even $10 makes a difference.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZWBK6SNyCMYdmi1_bNe0GfgakIq6o9WMzo1WEJdtsr9RlJCsjXn_ohwpr07qBHwE3mp2YipiyIxgHCkzLrAiBfGBMH6WTzcxsa55J5KmG-u-POtjTc0E23HOlZGAjhEOiMbm0ZxBeB3YgYypKBSAukVAGBAxdKBkIy6TbTlPKjN_)** Thanks, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29f6acd5a06240a3b23639ae64b0b20d&_e=siF_P93pCWHB-N0whWHLVI1rrvCarV0Aqb2wTZkW37O8_SoFPRMAC5xvaK4bjXLklEDU3P7MUiGIuoDPLa2xmfrwbHzbfQRlp4V7cJVx-lv3uztVUM4ddsrtzsdXcXm-WOD7U-_oGpdzag_m3EDHZTg1azQnXX00nAvzxQKWr6cue6XXb5mzuK2VCjwWx_mG2otHCa5S08sWcuc1m03xxfnMYOeI1D5nx4ZRfPMVZNh_P-mf8hZRX11B3vpFsPY2YEVT8320BSpfQT3QxB1pV7yqoBoTVQpxxqoBzGelutpImTqC6_CDlxSXTL4klfue)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the EPA NOT to approve gene-silencing pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the EPA from approving the sale of new, risky GENE-SILENCING PESTICIDES!** **[Take action now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Agrichemical corporation GreenLight Biosciences (GLB) used genetic engineering and nano-scale pesticide coatings to create a new pesticide that tries to **kill insects by interfering with their genetic material.** Despite how little we know about this new technology, it could reach the market before the company finishes its field trial research, and _before_ the EPA has even evaluated the full data. This pesticide could easily drift and harm people, **endangered species** , and beneficial insects! But we don’t know how, Friend – EPA’s review of GreenLight Biosciences data leaves important human and environmental health issues unaddressed. Even worse is that **we don’t know whether the masks and protective gear for farmworkers will be at all effective** with this novel pesticide. Remember, Friend, this pesticide could _**interfere with genetic material**_ – a key part of the core instructions for living organisms. It’s too risky to let this pesticide onto the market without a longer-term full assessment of its potential impacts. But **we have less than ONE WEEK to submit comments to the EPA** before it could move forward. **[Please, Friend, STOP the EPA from approving RISKY, UNDERSTUDIED RNA-INTERFERING pesticides before it’s too late! Sign the petition now!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038447?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***287 more signatures needed from your area*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038448?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Not only is this new pesticide potentially harmful, there’s also evidence that it could be _**essentially useless!**_ One experiment of a similar product found that after nine rounds of use, some insects became more than **11,000 fold resistant to the pesticide’s effects.** Why risk so much for a product that might become rapidly ineffective against its target, the Colorado potato beetle?
There’s also the concern of corporate control. Corporations developing these gene-silencing pesticides claim they should have ownership of any organisms (_and their offspring_) on which the pesticide is sprayed, even if the spraying is off-target and unintentional. This would **give biotech companies expansive property rights over nature!**
Ask yourself, Friend: Do you really want this new pesticide on the market? Sprayed into our environment and on farms where people are working? Me neither – **but the EPA gave you just 15 days total to make your voice heard.** [**Send your message now before this reckless pesticide approval is rammed through!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038449?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038448?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Dana Perls
Senior food & agriculture program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

| | Peter, The Hamas Terrorist organization has launched an act of war against the people of Israel. This is an unprecedented, barbaric, and deadly attack. I condemn this assault on the Jewish people, I condemn the Hamas terrorists, and I condemn Iran for funding them. Our country must and will stand with our ally Israel and provide all support necessary. This cowardly and brutal attack on civilians reminds us of the danger that Iran and its state-sponsored terrorism has spread and why the United States must stand with Israel to eradicate the Hamas terror organization. As this horror continues to unfold, I stand with Israel today and always. \- Jon Kaiman

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The Swamp Strikes Back
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Swamp, and now they 're plotting to EXPEL me from Congress
body:
They want revenge.

| | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d528ecc298a4ccb9e58f79971194588&_e=bT0YwBYkZ_vAxQ7R9ZP2xlSKK5j4qnsMBBDeQkBEDxn3TPfybzZpsGqCtaklI87vA1iG9K-2CvH2lCeU3mni8PFyvl-eS8iJ7K2wqpFpO4IWEQOTlydHbqHDN1HClhVSHzAHWCKBCGU8uPnr0uHXy9qW8V5h0CpgUw3lWUSEWMioYuHYD2meK_JhZEyuxKMg3KbwGhXOgMzTbhvEE_aTOp3x4jlijNWIdmQhPbyYTssGz41p5mV-tUCq6QaIVxeXak25ebjazlsO2PVsK0iKNCy6D5onEjh2wb8ePo65FWvQIsjzsQjFXkRUzyb3lBVD)
---
Friend, we made history in the House this week.
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d528ecc298a4ccb9e58f79971194588&_e=bT0YwBYkZ_vAxQ7R9ZP2xlSKK5j4qnsMBBDeQkBEDxn3TPfybzZpsGqCtaklI87vA1iG9K-2CvH2lCeU3mni8PFyvl-eS8iJ7K2wqpFpO4IWEQOTlydHbqHDN1HClhVSHzAHWCKBCGU8uPnr0uHXy9qW8V5h0CpgUw3lWUSEWMgkjpKIhdSPjiDHe2lcSsSHQRivz8eHwJeW-TVIwdCA-lYt6zH-8mpGwYuhrwsU5GXQnLOO05f251ZYTjgqNcjsfB0eo5Ff7bquFyzDKZfQb7D6sAObb9B_bguNRzsbrGIqsCMq0c6yAL5Y_JcXI25n)
---
For the first time in a long time, a politician was held accountable for breaking their promise to the American people.
Everyone knows Washington is broken, and lots of Republicans talk about how dysfunctional it is, but _**nobody ever does anything about it!**_
**That all changed when I stood up to the entire Swamp and removed Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.**
We're not going to save this country from being destroyed if we keep doing business as usual. It's going to take courage and decisive action to eradicate the culture of failure and decline that rots our Congress to its core.
Of course, the lobbyists and special interests who control the politicians in Washington want Congress to work just the way it does: FOR THEM!
**I want Congress to work the way the Founders intended: FOR YOU!**
Americans didn't give Republicans the majority in the House to keep funding the Biden Pelosi agenda, they elected us to stop the insanity and get our country working for the people again.
**The RINOs in the Republican party are FURIOUS at me for exposing the fact they are bought and paid for by the Swamp, and now they 're plotting to EXPEL me from Congress.**
| [ **SAVE GAETZ** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d528ecc298a4ccb9e58f79971194588&_e=bT0YwBYkZ_vAxQ7R9ZP2xlSKK5j4qnsMBBDeQkBEDxn3TPfybzZpsGqCtaklI87vA1iG9K-2CvH2lCeU3mni8PFyvl-eS8iJ7K2wqpFpO4IWEQOTlydHbqHDN1HClhVSHzAHWCKBCGU8uPnr0uHXy9qW8V5h0CpgUw3lWUSEWMhgB08rdM23T8xCkaLOk-YjDLpD6IChmnsCK-_2VnR54KF6GdyGciMwse8WDEMASQ7kM-HlJE0WRDFYH_2kcys4NAOl0N_RE06E3oYRXEgvJao9Z2a9Bl6Y6sWFcHITGl3S575WCaksg-6xAsPpW5MY)
---
**[We 're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and I'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d528ecc298a4ccb9e58f79971194588&_e=bT0YwBYkZ_vAxQ7R9ZP2xlSKK5j4qnsMBBDeQkBEDxn3TPfybzZpsGqCtaklI87vA1iG9K-2CvH2lCeU3mni8PFyvl-eS8iJ7K2wqpFpO4IWEQOTlydHbqHDN1HClhVSHzAHWCKBCGU8uPnr0uHXy9qW8V5h0CpgUw3lWUSEWMgOdHztBOussayuZE-7iKDnJJfXm4nugyWDXSC19BS98mvFWmq3RTLn5zycBGgS4qtXCezL3krhdbkqwMvd5GhedKGqj1ekOPBUiNbtYdW1aD9JIheNRQXUpwrS_Qzya-oqh9e7dLrRQMczM7CauCKh)**
If the Swamp expels me for taking a stand, it won't happen again for a generation. Nothing will change, and our country will be doomed.
I've been humbled by the outpouring of support, and I'll never apologize for funding my political operation exclusively from patriots that share my determination. Thanks for standing strong, Matt Gaetz
| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d528ecc298a4ccb9e58f79971194588&_e=bT0YwBYkZ_vAxQ7R9ZP2xlSKK5j4qnsMBBDeQkBEDxn3TPfybzZpsGqCtaklI87vA1iG9K-2CvH2lCeU3mni8PFyvl-eS8iJ7K2wqpFpO4IWEQOTlydHbqHDN1HClhVSHzAHWCKBCGU8uPnr0uHXy9qW8V5h0CpgUw3lWUSEWMgMp-Bj_dSGTz0VAAgpHPFUydeuh7ArL5aVSMcyIsxZO7xTgtylr9a7EYSI6cV2K4aOFxCbwJNOW6sb-Go7BRwPQdTICRTX11NdOcspZVNtUceDQv-3Vp2wgDTtTGA1OZhswO3W8Nh-Tvv9hOI8PNIL)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... * Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... body:

body:
Here is the truth:
#
Derek —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
Most people don't know it, but election after election, VoteVets is one of the top outside spending organizations of any group on the left or the right.
We are also one of the most effective.
Not only has Rachel Maddow noted that our ads are some of the best of previous elections, but the ads also test very well with voters.
In short, VoteVets moves voters — and more of them than almost any outside spending group.
But another thing most people don't know is that almost all of our donations come from people giving small, individual donations — most of which come in response to emails like this.
So when you see our ads helping to defeat Trump running and moving voters, when you see us helping Democrats hold the Senate and take the House... It's donations to emails like this that make it happen.
But that means from time-to-time we have to ask. And since we're already running ads, today is one of those days:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 to VoteVets today? Every single donation matters. Each one goes a long way toward helping us move the voters we need to win in this election.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231008-15&t=1&akid=17404%2E3013755%2E-1Dq5Y)

But another thing most people don't know is that almost all of our donations come from people giving small, individual donations — most of which come in response to emails like this. So when you see our ads helping to defeat Trump running and moving voters, when you see us helping Democrats hold the Senate and take the House... It's donations to emails like this that make it happen. But that means from time-to-time we have to ask. body:
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my October 2023 Priorities Survey.
---
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for the next half of 2023, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from thousands of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through.
**That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my October 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form: [http://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-october-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187098/431439014/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=&emci=5f5beff4-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9e8c29ae-e365-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you.
Letitia James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Thu, Oct 5, 2023
Subject: Need to hear from you before midnight
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187099/431439015/-1997846888?code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=)

Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**
**[So please, will you be one of the 5,000 people I need to take my October Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187101/431439017/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=&emci=5f5beff4-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9e8c29ae-e365-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | **OCTOBER PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard.
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187104/431439020/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=&emci=5f5beff4-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9e8c29ae-e365-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, thanks to the valuable insight I've received from supporters like you, I've been able to prioritize the most urgent fights that have come up this year. I listened to people's top concerns and devoted myself to going toe-to-toe with anti-abortion extremists, taking on the gun lobby, and fighting against a record number of LGBTQ+ hate and discrimination efforts.
**But as the political climate continues to shift and GOP extremists continue to sharpen their attacks, I need your input ASAP to know where to devote my time next.**
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187107/431439023/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=&emci=5f5beff4-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9e8c29ae-e365-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71187109/431439026/1875563950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1217-su-nd&refcode=jtk1217-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThjMjlhZS1lMzY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6I2lfYszKmyUdxjh7g2d7yCtlQ7YoGvrV-lB_WTwmc8=&emci=5f5beff4-5b64-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9e8c29ae-e365-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: [WATCH] A special message from Jon Hamm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Jon Hamm's got a message for Missouri.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38523?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC)
**_[Click here to watch this special message from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help me replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38523?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC)_**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: This is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, his approval has dropped to just 42%. And now, our race is in a statistical tie more than a year out from Election Day.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking me since the day I got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your support right now gives us the resources to keep delivering our message to voters every day between now and Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38523?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38524?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38523?refcode=em20231008-3940&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3940%2E614464%2ENifWNC)

It’s about time Missourians had a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.
Thanks for standing with me,
Lucas

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About The Coming Crisis** **This might be your only warning...** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **" Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=279dbb0395e146ff9dea05c5823a915f&_e=6LApOs7H2TX76ZFGPrRoWiSgO48a-xegCq9W8d1wIB4eGfGHAnSC4TB6jWnuQT09EiJaX7lNdoEwit_6Nt1uGUukmE16fco6n-iPsjIt0Am8FrP7jWD8D6X2Z1eiv16GbyVlA-qLzCjXw18R9vcDCIMvSarMCX1nDGsqG7MeUMbzX6_9jo5h_OKpvCUKmXGkTNEvkuuAWIVS1cXt3JpzLfc5KsWZ1DxtoYBkbSX-sL8DLanNzKGCTJPq5om1Y_A2B6nAt1ndu1hKMRXdY5eZjvm7AWCr_atImSAl08sJvwo%3D). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=279dbb0395e146ff9dea05c5823a915f&_e=6LApOs7H2TX76ZFGPrRoWiSgO48a-xegCq9W8d1wIB4eGfGHAnSC4TB6jWnuQT09EiJaX7lNdoEwit_6Nt1uGUukmE16fco6n-iPsjIt0Am8FrP7jWD8D6X2Z1eiv16GbyVlA-qLzCjXw18R9vcDCIpqtt65ckmomJOUXfSxlzP5Dx7jn9N2xgTdMCEMGMqlHEXaJFa_mIiavW1J5GV5XeaxJh-lylrC0l0IhM8ODx079e8MI517UvaT7jdDwE6k9ORFdCPf7E1UgozESCDtB-yc50x7tkl9jv3MZWa1I8Y%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. clean_body: This might be your only warning... The Truth About The Coming Crisis This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... * Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

We know that the 2024 race will be as competitive as it gets. _But Roy told President Biden that 2024 is the year Democrats would win all across the ballot._ Look, our presidential elections have long been some of the most competitive in the country — and Republicans know they need to carry our state to retake the White House. We’ll need to connect with voters and ensure they’re ready to cast their ballot, and we’ll need to create a groundswell of Democratic engagement and enthusiasm.

But Roy told President Biden that 2024 is the year Democrats would win all across the ballot. Look, our presidential elections have long been some of the most competitive in the country — and Republicans know they need to carry our state to retake the White House. We can’t allow that to happen. = | = North Carolina is a truly purple state. It is possible for Democrats to win statewide — Roy did it twice, even when Donald Trump carried the state. But we know firsthand that it takes a lot of hard work and preparation to overcome far-right Republicans, especially as they seek to prevent some of us from making our voices heard. We’ll need to connect with voters and ensure they’re ready to cast their ballot, and we’ll need to create a groundswell of Democratic engagement and enthusiasm. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
Gov. Glenn Youngkin has said he will institute an abortion ban should the GOP win a trifecta.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191084/431453059/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=&emci=33a96c82-8064-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=419b8b5d-eb65-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Today marks one month until Virginia votes in an election that will decide the future of reproductive rights for millions of Virginia women.
We'll explain why in just a moment, but if you don't have the time to read — **[will you pitch in anything you can right now to help our Virginia Newsroom _Dogwood_ reach voters with critical information in the run-up to Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191086/431453061/1023525583?refcode=em20231008&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=)**
Incredibly, Virginia is the last southern state without a post-Roe abortion ban. Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin has vowed to change that if Republicans retake control of the General Assembly.
With slim majorities and every seat in the State Legislature up for grabs, Youngkin could get his way, despite polling that shows Virginians support keeping abortion access legal.
With early voting underway in Virginia, our _Dogwood_ is already reporting critical updates about election news, deadlines, and what’s at stake in the election.👇
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191088/431453063/1023525583?refcode=em20231008&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=)
**With your support,_Dogwood’s_ coverage can have the same kind of positive impact we saw our reporting have in Michigan’s fight for reproductive freedom.**
After the Supreme Court overturned Roe, our Michigan newsroom, _The Gander_ surveyed Michiganders views on abortion. Then, in an experiment, we exposed some of these same folks to previous _Gander_ coverage of the state’s controversial 1931 abortion ban. After seeing our reporting, we resent the same survey to see if people’s views had changed.
**The results spoke for themselves, Peter.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191090/431453065/1023525583?refcode=em20231008&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=)
**Those who read our local coverage were _more likely_ to oppose criminalizing abortion by 5 points.**
Consequently, voters turned out in droves to enshrine reproductive rights into the state constitution.
This work is only made possible with your generous support. **[So if you can, please pitch in anything you can today to power our innovative journalism.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191092/431453072/1023525583?refcode=em20231008&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=)**
**[Pitch In ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191094/431453080/1023525583?refcode=em20231008&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE5YjhiNWQtZWI2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orBD2Sor78OqCkskitldhlK2mG3MOr77tSvnhZlDTxk=)**

Glenn Youngkin has vowed to change that if Republicans retake control of the General Assembly. With slim majorities and every seat in the State Legislature up for grabs, Youngkin could get his way, despite polling that shows Virginians support keeping abortion access legal. With early voting underway in Virginia, our Dogwood is already reporting critical updates about election news, deadlines, and what’s at stake in the election.👇 = With your support,Dogwood’s coverage can have the same kind of positive impact we saw our reporting have in Michigan’s fight for reproductive freedom. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe, our Michigan newsroom, The Gander surveyed Michiganders views on abortion. Then, in an experiment, we exposed some of these same folks to previous Gander coverage of the state’s controversial 1931 abortion ban. After seeing our reporting, we resent the same survey to see if people’s views had changed. The results spoke for themselves, Peter. = Those who read our local coverage were more likely to oppose criminalizing abortion by 5 points. Consequently, voters turned out in droves to enshrine reproductive rights into the state constitution. This work is only made possible with your generous support. = = Thank you for standing with us! Courier HQ Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191692/431455110/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMwMzYxMTAtZWM2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rmZKg_ZKoasH4leSIp15oArjlLKpXFGQbwU5cGpurnU=)
_My husband and three children._
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.

We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider, and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.**
**_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._**
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable among us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.

With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
**[So please, will you join the fight for a better future by donating $5 to my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71191693/431455111/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMwMzYxMTAtZWM2NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rmZKg_ZKoasH4leSIp15oArjlLKpXFGQbwU5cGpurnU=)**

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: surreal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Team, this is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 156 years later, only 3 Black women have served in the U.S. Senate. I’m running to change that, but I can’t make history again without your help. Will you rush $10 or more to send another Black woman to the Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?

http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4486-bu-text

I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf.

The day I was sworn in, I carried that scarf.

It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason.

And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn into the Senate.

If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $10 to my Senate campaign? Every donation goes toward creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board.

http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_lbr?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4486-bu-text

Thank you,

Lisa

Team, Brian Fitzpatrick and House Republicans just tore themselves apart and proved they can't govern themselves, let alone the country. From my perspective, House Republicans are what we in the military call FUBAR – f**ked up beyond all recognition (or repair) – thanks to MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz. **First:** They nearly shut down the government, which would have put our national security at risk and left our troops without pay. Fortunately, House Democrats saved the day. **Then:** Gaetz retaliated by ousting the House Speaker, creating a new national security threat – because the House can't get anything done until they elect a new speaker. Republicans have essentially told those who would harm us, "Come on in. We're not home, but the cash register is wide open." **I know it can be easy to look at what's happening and think our whole government is FUBAR. But the fact is,** the only thing that is FUBAR is one party – with weak leaders like Brian Fitzpatrick who let the worst among their ranks run amok. We can fix what is broken by electing strong leaders who will stand up to the MAGA agents of chaos. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: 🌤️ Weather report
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We already know which way the wind is blowing, and we NEED to be ready for the storms ahead
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=595%2E791427%2EjUgObH)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231008-1-t4&t=2&akid=595%2E791427%2EjUgObH)
Good morning, team! It's gonna be a crisp fall morning day in Minnesota's 5th district — we've got a high of 59° on the forecast and the sun is shining!
Whatever the weather, wherever you are, we know **[it's a beautiful morning to make your first contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan Omar and our re-election campaign for Congress. What do you say?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231008-1-t4&t=3&akid=595%2E791427%2EjUgObH)**
**Here's why:**
* We're now less than a year out from our primary elections, and the right-wing super PACs and their billionaire donors are already laser-focused on how they can defeat Ilhan in 2024.

* They're going to pour millions upon millions of dollars into Minnesota to try and defeat us — which means it's going to take a LOT of resources to fight back.

* We fund our campaign a different way — the _right_ way — **together.** The vast majority of our fundraising comes from small-dollar, grassroots contributions, often to emails just like this one.

**Long story short...we already know which way the wind is blowing, and we NEED to be ready for the storms ahead.**
So please:
**[Will you chip in $3, $10, or whatever amount feels right for you on and stand with Ilhan Omar on this beautiful morning? The only way we'll reach our goals before we're legally required to report our numbers is together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231008-1-t4&t=4&akid=595%2E791427%2EjUgObH)**

Thank you for anything you can chip in today.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

Peter --

We’re building a true grassroots movement, and supporters like you are at the heart of it. This campaign is about _you_ \-- it’s about reelecting Joe and Kamala to ensure we can continue making progress on the issues that matter to **all of us,** from tackling the climate crisis to lowering everyday costs for working families.

**That’s why we’re asking you to personally endorse Joe.**
****It’s simple: When everyday Americans come together and fight for progress, we know we can overcome _anything_ and move our country forward. _

Over the last few years, Joe and Kamala have made so much progress towards ensuring our country lives up to the values we promise, and making this a place where any person can thrive.
[**So, Peter, will you add your name and personally endorse Joe Biden and Kamala Harris for reelection? name: Take Action via Malamed HQ
subject: Tell Biden: Decriminalize marijuana now!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**Tell Biden to decriminalize marijuana! >> [_We're looking for 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=1&akid=492%2E8507%2E5CPzag)**
---

**The good news:** Joe Biden vowed to decriminalize marijuana!!

**The bad news:** We are _still_ waiting for him to act on his promise!!

[NOW >> We’re asking 5,000 supporters to add their name to our petition and tell Joe Biden to finally decriminalize marijuana!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=2&akid=492%2E8507%2E5CPzag)

[SIGN ON: Tell Biden to decriminalize marijuana!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=3&akid=492%2E8507%2E5CPzag)

During his 2020 presidential campaign, President Biden vowed to decriminalize cannabis.

His administration has recommended marijuana be reclassified to a Schedule III drug from a Schedule I – and has acknowledged the medical benefits of the drug.

_But we are still waiting for him to act on his promise and decriminalize marijuana!_

**THE TIME TO ACT IS NOW:** [_Tell President Biden to act now and finally make good on his promise to decriminalize cannabis ASAP! >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=4&akid=492%2E8507%2E5CPzag)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/122?t=5&akid=492%2E8507%2E5CPzag)

**Our goal is to add 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight so he hears us loud and clear.**

Thank you for taking action,

Malamed HQ

name: Team Pramila
subject: Remember No Labels, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This information is crucial to our ability to mobilize at any moment to protect Democrats at the polls next year.
#
Peter, you have to know the latest on the corporate-funded plan to deliver the White House back to Donald Trump in 2024.
This information is _crucial_ to our ability to mobilize at any moment to protect Democrats at the polls next year.
**Remember No Labels?** It’s an organization funded by big corporations that is hellbent on running a third-party candidate against Joe Biden — which would pave the way for a second term for Donald Trump.
**Now here’s the latest:** News reports are saying No Labels is currently vetting potential candidates to run as the spoiler candidate in their scheme. Their list of potential anti-Biden candidates includes Republican Senator Bill Cassidy, Andrew Yang, and even Joe Manchin. They are readying their plans to put this spoiler on the ballot in multiple states.
2024 will be here before we know it, Peter, and we’re sure to see even more attempts from powerful special interests to sway our elections and undermine our progress. **We cannot allow No Labels to succeed in undermining Joe Biden and paving the way for a second term for Trump.**
Pramila is working overtime to ensure that No Labels is exposed for the fraudulent organization it truly is **— but she needs our support to keep up our movement's momentum in order to fight back.**
**[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give today to power our movement and ensure that we can continue running a successful and revolutionary progressive campaign?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46110?refcode=em20231008-3011&t=1&akid=3011%2E420207%2EzYK5Rg)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46110?refcode=em20231008-3011&t=20&akid=3011%2E420207%2EzYK5Rg)**

subject: I wanted you to be one of the first to know:

Peter, I wanted you to be one of the first to know: thanks to your generous support, our campaign raised over **$830,000** in the last fundraising quarter! Not only are we sending an undeniable message of grassroots strength, we’re also shattering fundraising records: **Never in California history has a challenger raised more than $800,000 in two off-year quarters.** This is a testament to our grassroots supporters like you, Peter. You’re truly equipping us with the resources we need to defeat Ken Calvert and usher in a new generation of leadership in Congress. And between the government nearly shutting down, a sham impeachment inquiry, and now a Speakerless House, these past few weeks have been an important reminder of how important it is to do just that. We have the momentum to end Ken Calvert’s 30-year career next November, but we can’t slow down now: [This is gearing up to be one of the most expensive House races in the country. Unlike our opponent, we're not accepting a dime from corporate PACs -- I'm counting on your ongoing support to flip this seat. Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Christie as the first choice of nearly 40% of respondents in the Granite State! "When looking at results in each individual early state, Trump has the least first-choice support in New Hampshire, at 25%. Christie leads that poll, with 39% of voters’ first choices." Let’s keep pushing! If we want to maintain our lead and see Chris Christie at the third GOP debate, we need to help him reach the Republican National Committee's 70,000 donor goal. | | Remember, he is just shy by a few thousand donations, and yours could be the 70,000 donation! name: Ron Wyden

body:
This would be laughable if it weren’t downright terrifying.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71197482/431472005/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM0MmY3Yi1mODY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QpMVKRyHSJmfEAwzx2c7fcxCYMyEbq44BHWCMmAVlI=&emci=e116a95d-7164-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=11c42f7b-f865-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | For years, the GOP has been catering to and emboldening the most extreme members of its party. Last week, Congress averted a government shutdown at the 11th hour, but we're just weeks away from another looming deadline. And after days of Republican infighting, far-right extremists in the House succeeded in ousting Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Now, there's no clear path forward to who will emerge as leader of the House of Representatives. Now, instead of getting to work to avoid a disastrous shutdown and deprive Americans of the services they rely on, the House Republican majority has been thrown into chaos, unable to elect a Speaker. If Republicans in the House can't even decide who they want leading them, I don't have high hopes they'll be able to agree on a plan to keep the government open in November. **As if this weren't already concerning enough, even ex-president Donald Trump's name has been floated to be the new Speaker of the House.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71197483/431472008/-2044921950?refcode=202-10-08-house-choas&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=11c42f7b-f865-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWM0MmY3Yi1mODY1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QpMVKRyHSJmfEAwzx2c7fcxCYMyEbq44BHWCMmAVlI=) I honestly cannot think of anyone less qualified to lead a legislative body. _The man has been indicted four times and impeached twice — he has no business leading any arm of our nation's government._ This would be laughable, if it weren't so downright terrifying. As we watch this chaos unfold in the House, keep in mind that **this is the future MAGA Republicans want** , and if given the opportunity, **they won't hesitate to spread their dysfunction to the Senate.** The Republican Party is not fit to lead our country. Plain and simple. The last few days have been a sobering reminder of why it's so critical to protect and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, and retake the House from this Republican chaos. **[Our movement is strong. We've pushed MAGA Republicans back before; now it's time to do it again. **_Begin Forwarded Message:_**
PETER – **_THIS IS HUGE NEWS: There will be a Black Woman in the US Senate!_**

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn5heBv6-Nf15tNN5yVxlsG8psVWeKuZxvEacOdWOHkrHK2bcXOXQOvYTGH3SeFqTbn3AS0uOM8o8YcOo3mwt5RiV86Bbqf2THzIPPwZqACRqSxCsuMqoho4F3uoMVSlMQjKi1On1Tp1GBI7oHa7AMHpwz5EMqZdJqk0exeFR95kYihbwt1lA2hWbWNst_bzmdiCBrDRHEOhZKIBmBDK5IULBUXSQFQJEYoQA-qOQL73iVPxsg972n21D95Jyd9mxQEmyjAWQAQM-qv7nEdE8JfPcEWvVTPVNQeN9-H4iROdaLvrmi8GAvfOEQuErKNDGJoPW8M66-Z2KCexnXi-5K9nwOFgWxFRhoa0W3uFvgPBg/409/HlfZqzQiTtGAHnaCwHVVkw/h5/-MoCccBdcyNz-SFIrY24BchoASiP4PymeQmiSHLcqVk)
That’s right. California Governor Gavin Newsom announced that he will appoint **Laphonza Butler** to the US Senate, taking the seat of the recently departed Dianne Feinstein.

Laphonza Butler will become the only Black woman currently in the Senate – **and the first openly lesbian Black woman to ever serve as a Senator.**

She’s been on the frontlines of the fight for abortion access and workers rights, both during her time as **President of Emily’s List,** and her career as a union president and campaign advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris.

[Here at The Collective PAC, we’re proud to see another Black woman serve as a US Senator – but the work is far from finished. Will you sign on to congratulate Laphonza Butler and show your solidarity for the fight to elect Black women everywhere? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn5heBv6-Nf15tNN5yVxlsG8psVWeKuZxvEacOdWOHkrHK2bcXOXQOvYTGH3SeFqTbn3AS0uOM8o8YcOo3mwt5RiV86Bbqf2THzIPPwZqACRqSxCsuMqoho4F3uoMVSlMQjKi1On1Tp1GBI7oHa7AMHpwz5EMqZdJqk0exeFR95kRqWHN95zTb0hWuhiC3P2gSEkCnCqCQMSFFTWHqHrZjTHX8FzP20C5gpsr6mJ0tSOq5yK4ybKeOy1x6N4q2xb_gmfDvv2hIOEBinHWo0jlCEzzObcrxYSNYPI6Yz_dOog5jisFLFAfAKRDIjHxrP9nyOGT8DpN3R_2deVdwqgmVmPOXOXjHwLPiI4lDLIEuUPw/409/HlfZqzQiTtGAHnaCwHVVkw/h6/1AWZW4IhgV9NynY1larm6W9WJMuchutsa3yKd6yl_cQ)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — The Senate finally has a Black woman, but here at The Collective PAC, our work is far from finished. We're fighting to elect qualified Black women — like Barbara Lee, Angela Alsobrooks, and Lisa Blunt Rochester — to the US Senate, and we need all hands on deck if we're going to win. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | ** | | Begin Forwarded Message: PETER – THIS IS HUGE NEWS: There will be a Black Woman in the US Senate! That’s right. California Governor Gavin Newsom announced that he will appoint Laphonza Butler to the US Senate, taking the seat of the recently departed Dianne Feinstein. Laphonza Butler will become the only Black woman currently in the Senate – and the first openly lesbian Black woman to ever serve as a Senator. She’s been on the frontlines of the fight for abortion access and workers rights, both during her time as President of Emily’s List, and her career as a union president and campaign advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. Thank you, — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:

That's why they're gearing up now to meet — and potentially surpass — that threshold before next summer to ensure that Arizonans have the opportunity to reverse this antiquated abortion ban once and for all. I'm proud of the work we here at Fairness Project have achieved to partner with campaigns across the country and enact the change people want to see in their communities. And it's only possible with our incredible grassroots supporters like you. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and help us get ready to fight like hell in Arizona and keep up our abortion ballot measure win streak. **[Will you make a contribution today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71211742/431484015/-267450525?&refcode=E4449-20231008-AZSingaturesFwd-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZiOGM4OC0wMzY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zyDyTCfDuwA0BhQORRIZxxm3BgLiNro0UTOhkMu0meI=)** Thank you so much for your continuous support, Kelly Hall

Hi Peter, it's Comet (Kurt's dog).
To answer the burning question on everyone's mind: yes, it is very difficult to type with paws. I get it done for Kurt, though, because I know how hard he's working for us.
Despite the hours of calling supporters, knocking on doors, and attending community meetings, Kurt still finds time to give me a walk every day. What else do I need to tell you to get you to chip in right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
Now, I've never said I'm a perfect dog. I like to bark and chase after lizards and javelinas (what can I say, I'm an Arizona dog), but that's not why I'm sending this message.
I don't know anything about Congress. What I do know is that Kurt is a hard working, compassionate friend who has spent his whole life helping others (oh, and he gives great belly rubs)! Kurt is exactly what we need in Washington right now - can you join me (well, not really) in chipping in to support him right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
What's that? You need a dog photo to really feel in the mood to donate? Alright, fine, here we go.
secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823 [secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
It's so easy to give and, heck, your fingers certainly work better than my paws. Don't make me sniff you out - please, can you chip in right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=100823]
Thank you,
Comet

With just 30 days until Election Day, this remains the most competitive race in the entire country. Hey Peter,

Tonight at midnight is our 30-day pre-general reporting deadline. In a moment, I'm going to share some important updates on this race, but first, I have to ask:

Will you chip in before midnight to help us close out this reporting period on a strong note and ensure we have the resources we need to win this tough race? Here's a link for you to donate → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?refcode2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71211856/431484717/1286826882?refcode=em23_231008_dline7_fndd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231008_dline7_fndd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e3e46280-0466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U0NjI4MC0wNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HexXo-A8OmIg0qmYSnPpzQeHj_vxF_Ei0O2mgq6yCmU=)

With just 30 days until Election Day, this remains the most competitive race in the entire country. _Politico_ is calling the match-up between me and my opponent, Daniel Cameron, "dramatically close."

That's why I haven't been surprised to see Cameron and his allies pouring millions into this race. They're spreading false, nasty lies about me and my record to try to deceive Kentuckians and buy this race.

Finishing this reporting period strongly is critical to ensuring we have what it takes to fight back against any attack that comes our way and continue reaching Kentuckians with our plan to protect our progress. But I can't do it without you, Peter.

Please chip in before midnight to help me take Cameron and his outside spending allies so we can continue to move Kentucky forward. → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?refcode2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71211865/431484724/1286826882?refcode=em23_231008_dline7_fndd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231008_dline7_fndd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e3e46280-0466-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U0NjI4MC0wNDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HexXo-A8OmIg0qmYSnPpzQeHj_vxF_Ei0O2mgq6yCmU=)

Andy

In a moment, I'm going to share some important updates on this race, but first, I have to ask: Will you chip in before midnight to help us close out this reporting period on a strong note and ensure we have the resources we need to win this tough race? Here's a link for you to donate → = With just 30 days until Election Day, this remains the most competitive race in the entire country. Politico is calling the match-up between me and my opponent, Daniel Cameron, "dramatically close." That's why I haven't been surprised to see Cameron and his allies pouring millions into this race. They're spreading false, nasty lies about me and my record to try to deceive Kentuckians and buy this race. Finishing this reporting period strongly is critical to ensuring we have what it takes to fight back against any attack that comes our way and continue reaching Kentuckians with our plan to protect our progress. But I can't do it without you, Peter. Please chip in before midnight to help me take Cameron and his outside spending allies so we can continue to move Kentucky forward. → = Thank you, Andy | PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States
