subject: Recruitment season is underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | |
---
Ok, Peter, don’t panic.

We know 2024 is right around the corner, and the elections at every level will be crucial to the direction of our country. That’s why Emerge is amping up our recruitment and training programs to EMPOWER bold Democratic women to run and win in every state. But we can’t do it without you. Emerge has seen unprecedented growth in the last 20 years, and we have the numbers to prove it. Because of our 24+ state affiliates and numerous national, democracy-building training programs like Seated Together and Gavel In, **Emerge has over 1,200 women in office – and we’re still counting! But Peter, that’s exactly why we’re building for 2024 NOW.** Recruitment season has already started for us, so we need to be prepared to get ahead of the filing deadlines and make sure more Emerge women are all over the map come 2024. But we can’t do it without you.
**So we’re asking 350 of our top supporters – including you, Peter – to donate $20.24 today and help power our woman-led movement to transform politics in 2024 and beyond. [Can we count on you to chip in now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71212506/431486858/-1986725773?amounts=5,20.24,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1329-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1MTU4MDMwLTA1NjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Takh3dS8IYeVDZKrvbh5_GHk3YhvVJjG5AgJWrYsAU=)**

I’m reaching out because I want to keep you posted about how I’ve spent my first few months representing you in Congress. I know there’s a lot going on in the headlines right now, so I wanted to take some time to let you know what I’ve done to serve YOU since taking office. My team and I have been busy helping neighbors navigate the messy federal bureaucracy, traveling to every corner of the district, meeting with community and business leaders, and answering questions from frustrated Virginians. On the issue side, I’ve also: - Cosponsored resolutions to protect Social Security and Medicare - Passed legislation preventing the sale of America’s emergency fuel supply to China - Passed amendments to protect Coastal Virginia while creating jobs and lowering energy costs - Been named Vice Chair of the Congressional Nursing Caucus - Voted to secure our southern border. - Been appointed Chair of the Veterans’ Affairs Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations - Voted to empower parents and children in the classroom - Advocated for pro-police bills in strong support of law enforcement officers. - Led over 50 colleagues in condemning partisan lies about veterans' benefits. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=99c31e22265e81d85235cdcf84165efbd95c2a5965efeb72ff9ca028916aa4716497d88b75bade9bbbfe1b87e465d49a32189bd40884026b1cc05dbc24d95fa3 And the best part? We’re just getting started. I’m excited for the work coming down the road that my team and I will accomplish for our veterans, our seniors, and every resident of Southeast Virginia. Now, I want to hear what issue you want me to focus on next! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=99c31e22265e81d85235cdcf84165efbd95c2a5965efeb72ff9ca028916aa4716497d88b75bade9bbbfe1b87e465d49a32189bd40884026b1cc05dbc24d95fa3 Please take a minute to complete my Voter Action Survey to let me know what’s on your mind. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=99c31e22265e81d85235cdcf84165efbd95c2a5965efeb72ff9ca028916aa4716497d88b75bade9bbbfe1b87e465d49a32189bd40884026b1cc05dbc24d95fa3 TAKE THE SURVEY I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished already, and I'm excited for the work that’s still to come. Take Care, Congresswoman Jen Kiggans (VA-02) https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=99c31e22265e81d88f02ba3ee93edf1625f809bbbfa128c3069c14433c44f67673b44cea9167fbf02b6f535ce1c44243be04b22c1dece0d22968c4c62b464da8 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=99c31e22265e81d84688414d7636ca93c6915b3bfe149a0966a773ebc3aca5aaacc1acfe353965b7885a0219f4c244d5c023191c68fa6943d55c8b5fab00dbe7 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. | Peter,

_**At the risk of sounding cliche, do you want the good news or bad news first?**_

The good news is that the U.S. Senate confirmed three military nominees to the Joint Chiefs of Staff last month, circumventing Tommy Tuberville’s blockade.

The bad news is that Tommy Tuberville’s blockade continues as more than 300 officials remain unconfirmed. The three approvals were a time-consuming procedural nightmare that was a last resort because Tuberville is using our nation’s top military leaders as political pawns. Tommy Tuberville is now bragging about his blockade, seeing the lengthy and unprecedented individual confirmations of the three officials not as a defeat but as a victory. He is gleefully boasting about how challenging it was to confirm military officials.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The U.S. military has one job: to protect American citizens on our own soil. | | Fellow American, There's a new daddy in town. The U.S. military has one job: to protect American citizens on our own soil. It’s not just illegal migrants, human trafficking, and fentanyl pouring through our open border anymore. Now, we have armed cartel gunmen directly invading our homeland. The cartels may be Mexican President Andrés Manuel López Obrador's sugar daddy now, but as President, I will call the President of Mexico in January 2025 to deliver a clear message that we will support you in decimating the cartels. Military force is both legally and morally justified. Time to end the crisis. | It's clear where I stand on this issue, but I want to hear from you. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. body:
We have exactly 30 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | |

**🚨 There are _30 days_ until Election Day 🚨** 30 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrEocII5I3aowmoSAHLQ26qlhxykP7uslwW28UTS2hIZ1s2BGJMUq685Elw3cNDwCxzjSWJ3NxwcSZrHnKZ0ECS72xbfcvqKryIIylweOO4CXP8jZsTsdfCB8chaBOpNNZpNUjIRN8rUnI_Y_QttbbJ7Jpp1uQhx95TpwW6iM2kUonu-iWH7G4h_Yty2gdPvREKaLs1BexFweUBuvY6pp5ZIydHrPjTp8fJJEajfOYbFCE-Dys-EMshcVMsoPX7d9h-By_oejGo0oYJH1mVnyEWyiKyu-3U9Cdib7MCHW5HidtsfiJ2zTyKyCWiMyRFXapg9ZgKZFXcio-hWJxapvlsXM/409/JECYxqYSRE-vNbVjsWrgfQ/h0/7rg97zWtvG-XHrjE6E4y_aH_ZLfOyZkmP5_BjhaMTrc) Republicans just funneled a staggering **_$4.4 million_** into Virginia, making this an even tougher battle to win. **We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – _there’s a hell of a lot more to do._** **[Rush $7 now »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xJdM4UPBsteMLVkfmLiDV3AYV6Ajmkcu1v1riNeitrEocII5I3aowmoSAHLQ26qlhxykP7uslwW28UTS2hIZ1s2BGJMUq685Elw3cNDwCxzjSWJ3NxwcSZrHnKZ0ECS72xbfcvqKryIIylweOO4CXP8jZsTsdfCB8chaBOpNNZpDgX37-t8M9ZCFN3JOJgOTusC5ynqx_xJi-o-lVdbopSHb7w0ZjoZydatsWDf8XeXNND0SYUHnQlNLIdCuitIomTcQbdRHXGhOjYgo7UvVwx1PzGEKU1OmQVLXeKOPGNi7mmaCp226TpPN67jt6PZmHTvoB1YvnoCldPqydpZeB8w1aI7rSSBXz5FsLU6DnLZZI3BF2HAnIKDaTlfXSsGhw/409/JECYxqYSRE-vNbVjsWrgfQ/h1/ZPe72bIB-LJPJpXapw20aTRSVFCaGm5UcJorYpjkcUs)** **Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory this November:** **Strategize** with our candidates in these final weeks

**Engage** voters through door-knocking and phone banking

clean_body: We have exactly 30 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 There are 30 days until Election Day 🚨 30 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans just funneled a staggering $4.4 million into Virginia, making this an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory this November: Strategize with our candidates in these final weeks Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in pivotal races like Virginia to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We launched a to spread the word about Chris' values, how to get involved with our team, and the countless organizations that are standing behind his re-election. = = = Chris met with hard-working labor leaders representing workers across Western PA. Chris is working everyday to make sure American workers have the benefits, training, and support they've earned. = Chris welcomed fall with Democratic local organizers at the Sewickley Harvest Festival. He met with leaders from the West Hills Women's Democratic Organization and the local chapter of Moms Demand Action. = Chris joined Lindsay Powell to support her campaign for HD21 State Representative. We have to work together to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this election season. Thanks to a grassroots campaign, Lindsay won the special election, protecting the Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. = = Thank you. – Team Deluzio HQ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. They're too busy competing to see who can come up with the most extreme _(and unpopular)_ policies possible. What you really deserve are leaders who are focused on the real issues — like safeguarding our fundamental rights, ensuring our communities are safe, and creating economic opportunities for every family. **That's why I'm working hard to flip this seat and help Democrats win back the House in 2024. But right now, I want to hear from YOU.** **[So, folks — would you be willing to spend 30 seconds sharing your views on the key issues you think Washington should prioritize? name: Brandon Presley
subject: I’m not expecting you to donate every time I ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
But first, let me explain. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71213386/431490451/17860314?refcode=ea.2dd8a6e4-0c66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.2dd8a6e4-0c66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmRkOGE2ZTQtMGM2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mLjBUFVDqAvLzmYUfRvte7D_gnZ4K4UJHcGOi-RXmsw=)
---
Peter, we're under a month out from Election Day in Mississippi, and things are heating up FAST:
* A brand spanking new poll shows us in a statistical tie with Tate Reeves.

* Meanwhile, Reeves is about to dig into his multi-million dollar war chest and flood the airwaves with misleading attack ads against us.

* Believe it or not, we’re ALREADY falling behind on our ambitious $130,000 online goal set for October.

**Look, I know you might not be able to chip into our campaign every time I ask, and that’s okay. I'm not expecting you to break the piggy bank every time I pop up in your inbox.**

But if just one or two people reading this email spared just $15 or $20, it would go a long way to power our GOTV efforts. Especially now, as we're hurtling towards our last and most critical filing deadline of the campaign at the end of October.

[So, what do you say, Peter? Meanwhile, Reeves is about to dig into his multi-million dollar war chest and flood the airwaves with misleading attack ads against us. Believe it or not, we’re ALREADY falling behind on our ambitious $130,000 online goal set for October. Look, I know you might not be able to chip into our campaign every time I ask, and that’s okay. I'm not expecting you to break the piggy bank every time I pop up in your inbox. But if just one or two people reading this email spared just $15 or $20, it would go a long way to power our GOTV efforts. name: Team Casey
subject: Pennsylvania will be the “heart of the political universe”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)
Peter,
**“Pennsylvania, as it always is, is going to be the heart of the political universe.”**
That’s what NBC’s Kristen Welker, the host of Meet The Press, had to say when discussing our 2024 election — **_and she’s right_**.
Between our battleground race to re-elect Bob Casey and the race for the White House, all eyes will be on Pennsylvania next year.
We have to be prepared for everything that’s coming our way. Our opponent has Mitch McConnell, the GOP’s shadiest billionaire donors, and hundreds of millions in his own bank account all ready to spend whatever it takes to flip Pennsylvania.
**To beat them, we’ll need grassroots supporters like you by our side every step of the way.**
**[Can you help us stay competitive in what could be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country by chipping in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231008-1?refcode=em20231008&refcode2=855_552475_Sgn6ku&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231008-1?refcode=em20231008&refcode2=855_552475_Sgn6ku&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)**
**_“It’s also a real test to see Republican strength because it's a potential pickup for Republicans. So I think they're going to be pouring a lot into this Senate race.”_**
Like Welker said, our Commonwealth is once again going to see huge amounts of spending. We know that the attacks are coming, and we have to be prepared to share Bob Casey’s record of fighting for Pennsylvanians from here until Election Day.
**[We’ll need your help to keep up this fight. So please, make a contribution of whatever you can to help our battleground Senate campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231008-1?refcode=em20231008&refcode2=855_552475_Sgn6ku&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)**
Thanks for being part of the team.
Together,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=855%2E552475%2ESgn6ku)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

| | _Consider these statistics._ **In my five years in Congress, I've:**
1. participated in 50% of all impeachment votes in history;
2. experienced the longest vote for Speaker of the House since before the Civil War (and the 5th longest ever);
3. dealt with the longest government shutdown in history;
4. survived an attack on the Capitol; and
5. witnessed the first-ever removal of a Speaker of the House by motion.

**I will never accept all this chaos as normal, and you shouldn't either.** We can and must do better. [**We're building a grassroots movement full of people who are ready for a government that works for them. **Here's the hard truth the Senate could easily devolve into the same dysfunction if we lose our Democratic majority.** Senator Menendez's refusal to resign is actively endangering that majority every day.
Just last week, a poll came out showing that I would beat a generic Republican in the general election while Senator Menendez would lose that same contest. We need to protect this seat at all costs.
I'm stepping up to run for Senate because we deserve a leader who will put the people of New Jersey above personal gain, and we need someone who will fight for the progress we've made and prevent the kind of backsliding Republicans are talking about.
[**It cannot be overstated how important protecting the Senate majority is. clean_body: | | | | Consider these statistics. In my five years in Congress, I've: 1. participated in 50% of all impeachment votes in history; 2. experienced the longest vote for Speaker of the House since before the Civil War (and the 5th longest ever); 3. dealt with the longest government shutdown in history; 4. survived an attack on the Capitol; and 5. witnessed the first-ever removal of a Speaker of the House by motion. I will never accept all this chaos as normal, and you shouldn't either. We can and must do better. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Here's the hard truth the Senate could easily devolve into the same dysfunction if we lose our Democratic majority. Senator Menendez's refusal to resign is actively endangering that majority every day. Just last week, a poll came out showing that I would beat a generic Republican in the general election while Senator Menendez would lose that same contest. We need to protect this seat at all costs. I'm stepping up to run for Senate because we deserve a leader who will put the people of New Jersey above personal gain, and we need someone who will fight for the progress we've made and prevent the kind of backsliding Republicans are talking about. = More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Since we have to place our order TONIGHT.

Hey Peter, it’s Shawn again. I wanted to forward my email from the other day because my team is placing our **last order** of campaign yard signs tonight, and we’re still looking for folks to sponsor signs! I know what you’re probably thinking: “Yard signs? Really?” YES, Peter — these signs are a low-cost and effective way for us to mobilize Democratic voters in Louisiana! In fact, they’re a critical part of our GOTV strategy, so I can’t stress this enough: We _need_ folks to step up and sponsor more signs today. **_[We can’t afford to lose any steam at this stage, so can I count on you to chip in just $10 to help sponsor yard signs that we can plant in high-traffic areas around Louisiana? name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Have you endorsed my campaign yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I couldn’t do this without you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)
Peter — We are building a grassroots team that will be the foundation of our campaign to defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and keep the Senate majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands. **So I need to know if you’re all-in to defend this battleground seat — _and our Democratic Senate majority along with it._ [Peter, will you sign on today to personally endorse my reelection campaign?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231008_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231008_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)
---
Elections in Wisconsin are won and lost by narrow margins — and next year’s election could very well be my most competitive (_and expensive_) one to date.
We can’t win this toss-up Senate seat without your help — _especially with TWO Republican megamillionaires with the ability to self-fund their campaigns making preparations to enter this Senate race._
I'm proud to have this motivated grassroots team by my side in the fight to protect abortion rights, Social Security, Medicare, voting rights, and so much more. But with this competitive reelection campaign ramping up, we’ll need even more folks committed to defending this seat and our Democratic Senate majority.
**[So I need to know: Will you personally endorse my reelection campaign today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231008_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)**
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2310_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231008_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)
---
Knowing I can count on your support makes all the difference, so thank you for endorsing this campaign. I couldn’t do this without you.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1296%2E35263%2EVwF2lm)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: MY ENDORSEMENT FOR SPEAKER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
You spoke. I listened. Now let’s appoint a Speaker who listens to the people.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=6a1a4d8dcb9c43d4bfa1881e64c24c00&_e=iJpqd3Cyh4l-vVysq0WJ_MSPbdreVnw-8NoD0zABLuERpoHlv0KIHghQwQlZOIo3PDeqwiDrxnY9jbgrWD2VNT-al4YRsUBrs-EgQpSTlfFRfPawc6tsWKTpQEHt-jqsCza2ufjBHoch_GVrFPHz8ukjK_0OF4qgyM15st7tv1N1XFZ8D7Zruz4B-7f8a-00sRKDOvKtMxfyutU81plThyL5Hu4FKdutAq3XABuGHIt-Ok-1jnKwPMAaLHoa-Qykf1GVVbumfH_562lgQxsoe7CE_WL2XueWmXNWudkfaoSzYRn1S3K53IbCpSs1q2lovwnpt0irbFItvWqtTcoy5mDgJlPpVy8NG3iUALCPuAtRCCSld0vrrDq7DHggEd2UsNCQarNyWDxVJnNEkaFqejCOrdED02RTZmhQqtr6pq2OMrYVsP439sEotkGG5TaOeePvYgsxgWwzoGvlIEKp3eMOU55oIWFtt6m5pYkoOlaCMYSZW9-AuDzLNsjDVUE0)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I asked patriots like YOU to take my survey on who should be the next Speaker of the House.
---
While I was certainly flattered that so many of you wanted me to serve as Speaker (_wouldn’t that be interesting?_), it was abundantly clear that the NUMBER ONE answer given was _Jim_ _Jordan_.
---
**So, I did what I always do, and listened to the people, and endorsed Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House.**

---
**And, of course, when I am officially inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States, I will need a great patriot Speaker of the House.**

---

clean_body: You spoke. I listened. Now let’s appoint a Speaker who listens to the people.| | | | | Patriot, I asked patriots like YOU to take my survey on who should be the next Speaker of the House. While I was certainly flattered that so many of you wanted me to serve as Speaker (wouldn’t that be interesting?), it was abundantly clear that the NUMBER ONE answer given was Jim Jordan. So, I did what I always do, and listened to the people, and endorsed Jim Jordan for Speaker of the House. And, of course, when I am officially inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States, I will need a great patriot Speaker of the House. We need a great patriot, Jim Jordan, as speaker who will defund the weaponization of our justice system, issue subpoenas, hold Joe Biden accountable for his crimes and corruption, stop the release and resettlement of illegal aliens into your communities, and stand up to the Radical Left Communists who are destroying this country. Beginning on January 20, 2025, our movement of patriots, working with loyal allies of our America First cause, will save our country and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend: Before I ask you to chip in $10 today, I want to make sure you know exactly who and what you're supporting.

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. My parents taught me to work hard, be kind, and serve my community. So I've spent my life trying to do just that.

That means fighting in the Senate to raise the minimum wage, protect Social Security and Medicare, and hold big banks and corporations accountable for the damage they've done to workers and our economy. It means standing up for voting rights, reproductive rights, marriage equality, and more.

**I want what most Americans want:_to ensure our nation delivers on its promises._ But right now, I need your help.** [Experts say that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and the only way I can defend my seat and keep up our progress is with your critical support. So please, will you chip in $10 or more between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right away?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54620?t=6&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)

I'm facing my toughest reelection yet.

_Politico_ reports that Ohio could decide Senate control, and Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top GOP target in 2024. That's why this race is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive in the country.

**But unlike my GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this campaign – so I'm fully relying on $10 and $20 donations from folks like you to power our movement to victory.**

[Please, will you chip in $10 or more now to help me win in Ohio, keep the Senate blue, and continue delivering for families across the country?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54620?t=7&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54621?t=8&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54622?t=9&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54623?t=10&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54624?t=11&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54620?t=12&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
Thanks for being on our team. I'm humbled to have your support.

With gratitude,
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54620?t=13&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11053%2E878179%2EkQ4P4x)
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: whiteboard anyone, anywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31024%2E3422442%2EO1MuC2)
As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural. Now, thanks to a big purse and small whiteboard, you’ll rarely catch me unprepared to use a whiteboard.
You too, can whiteboard anyone, at any time. Here’s how to do it:
1. **Work backward:** Determine what you want your lesson to accomplish.
2. **Let the whiteboard speak for itself:** It’s a visually engaging tool, so utilize it. Draw a chart or graph. Hold off on simple bullet points.
3. **Control the conversation:** In Congressional Hearings, we only have a few minutes to question a witness. That means really utilizing your questions.
4. **Don't fear silence:** No explanation needed.
5. **Be fearless:** Accountability is a good thing.

The whiteboard has helped me break down the math behind corporate greed and hold power to account. [**Can you chip in a few bucks to help send me and my whiteboard to the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231008-1?refcode=EMAM08_1_WHI_20231008_V1_F&refcode2=31024_3422442_O1MuC2&akid=31024%2E3422442%2EO1MuC2)**

clean_body: As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural. As a former teacher and professor, bringing a whiteboard to Congress felt only natural. Now, thanks to a big purse and small whiteboard, you’ll rarely catch me unprepared to use a whiteboard. You too, can whiteboard anyone, at any time. Here’s how to do it: 1. Work backward: Determine what you want your lesson to accomplish. 2. Let the whiteboard speak for itself: It’s a visually engaging tool, so utilize it. Draw a chart or graph. Hold off on simple bullet points. 3. Control the conversation: In Congressional Hearings, we only have a few minutes to question a witness. That means really utilizing your questions. 4. Don't fear silence: No explanation needed. 5. Be fearless: Accountability is a good thing. The whiteboard has helped me break down the math behind corporate greed and hold power to account. Thank you! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop Big Oil megaprojects from threatening endangered orcas
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038565?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Endangered Southern Resident orcas are just one oil spill away from EXTINCTION. [_Take action now to STOP Big Oil! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038566?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Among threats like human-driven climate change, ocean acidification, and ocean pollution, endangered Southern Resident orcas are also **clinging to survival** due to chronic lack of food. And right now, Big Oil and the shipping industry are driving forward **two _DEVASTATING MEGAPROJECTS_** that would drive away even more of the Chinook salmon that these treasured marine animals depend on. Two orca calves were just recently born into the Southern Resident orca pods, which is a hopeful sign towards restoring this dwindling whale population. But the mortality rate for newborn orcas is _**as high as 50%**_ , so if these two newborns are going to make it through their first year, we must STOP Big Oil and the shipping industry from decimating the Chinook salmon population and threatening orca survival. [_**Will you help Friends of the Earth fight back against Big Oil and **_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038567?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[_**give these two newborn orca babies a chance at life? Add your name now >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038567?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038568?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Orcas are already _**just ONE single oil spill**_ away from being completely _**WIPED OUT**_**.** And the two proposed Big Oil and shipping megaprojects could very likely be what pushes them to the BRINK.
The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic and scare away Chinook salmon from orca habitats. The noise from the massive cargo ships will also disrupt the orcas’ sonar hunting methods, disorienting and preventing them from finding the few salmon left in their waters.
The expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline will also increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat **SEVEN-FOLD** \-- from one tanker a week to _ONE PER DAY!_ Worst of all, it will also be pushing millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- the dirtiest kind -- out in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat. _**And we know that when you move oil, oil spills are practically a GUARANTEE.**_
_Big Oil and shipping corporations are putting profits over the survival of the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States._ If they get away with their deadly dealings on these two destructive megaprojects, it’s likely to _**seal the death sentence for Southern Resident orcas.**_ [_**TAKE ACTION: Friend, orcas desperately need us to be their voice and fight back against corporate greed. Please speak up NOW for these defenseless endangered whales before it’s too late >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038569?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2038570?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting endangered orcas,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Endangered Southern Resident orcas are just one oil spill away from EXTINCTION. == Among threats like human-driven climate change, ocean acidification, and ocean pollution, endangered Southern Resident orcas are also clinging to survival due to chronic lack of food. And right now, Big Oil and the shipping industry are driving forward two DEVASTATING MEGAPROJECTS that would drive away even more of the Chinook salmon that these treasured marine animals depend on. Two orca calves were just recently born into the Southern Resident orca pods, which is a hopeful sign towards restoring this dwindling whale population. But the mortality rate for newborn orcas is as high as 50% , so if these two newborns are going to make it through their first year, we must STOP Big Oil and the shipping industry from decimating the Chinook salmon population and threatening orca survival. == | == Orcas are already just ONE single oil spill away from being completely WIPED OUT. And the two proposed Big Oil and shipping megaprojects could very likely be what pushes them to the BRINK. The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic and scare away Chinook salmon from orca habitats. The noise from the massive cargo ships will also disrupt the orcas’ sonar hunting methods, disorienting and preventing them from finding the few salmon left in their waters. The expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline will also increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD \-- from one tanker a week to ONE PER DAY! Worst of all, it will also be pushing millions of gallons per day of toxic tar sands oil -- the dirtiest kind -- out in oil tankers through this already delicate orca habitat. And we know that when you move oil, oil spills are practically a GUARANTEE. Big Oil and shipping corporations are putting profits over the survival of the only endangered species of killer whale in the United States. If they get away with their deadly dealings on these two destructive megaprojects, it’s likely to seal the death sentence for Southern Resident orcas. == == Thanks for protecting endangered orcas, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

| | Peter, I served on the front lines in Iraq and Afghanistan. I lost friends there, I put my life on the line there, and I fought terrorists face-to-face there.

**_As you might expect, I have some strong feelings about what this administration is doing to America on the world stage._**

The Left is bending the knee to our enemies and putting their efforts into foreign wars instead of putting our veterans and our American legacy first. **[My name is Hung Cao. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to get our country back on track, but I can’t do it alone. Will you join my team today to take back our majority and BRING BACK American principles?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=6b7af559a059470eaaa5c74bc8cd86ac&_e=DSVwvxsW_oP6ghSrARUnhRHCpO5Be3eUcZC9o83wkpuDffh5ivIyEz2eCGjzRvTFaRIMSwgjdCvWRXx5GAqoiDznsuk44FPytW_A17T92PRB57x6BXLO22twoHaQkjDhCNebUjYNNF1SoEf5cxhFxa-b9ime6_No-XcphYdteJ55h9wRKQiCUFCNY6EmUHum21CrBcA8ZhuA1AhP4LEvn1k9E79vGMfl04afO3uhb1Oux0E40huQZ02ETDD6qo98zhnKb-Z4z-6KA3usICJx74Q9xLUafYB1TipbZ3ZQyhuDWosNqcX_dplP76oqwMAOGPEJDC3VUdjll9yWkwq3KHR6LQX9h8lVCBSJsp4PDTXVRPBLMAhv4X1tQq1xe90P)**

When you’re in combat, you never think of yourself but the people beside you. You do everything to defeat the enemy and get your team out safely.

_I doubt many of today’s career politicians would be up to the challenge._

**What we need in the U.S. Senate are veteran values. I’m not running for myself - I’m running because I want to make sure you, and our children, have access to the same American Dream I fought for.**

**[If I win this race, I give you my word that I will defend our freedom every day. Now, I just need you to have faith in our mission. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I served on the front lines in Iraq and Afghanistan. I lost friends there, I put my life on the line there, and I fought terrorists face-to-face there. As you might expect, I have some strong feelings about what this administration is doing to America on the world stage. The Left is bending the knee to our enemies and putting their efforts into foreign wars instead of putting our veterans and our American legacy first. When you’re in combat, you never think of yourself but the people beside you. You do everything to defeat the enemy and get your team out safely. I doubt many of today’s career politicians would be up to the challenge. What we need in the U.S. Senate are veteran values. I’m not running for myself - I’m running because I want to make sure you, and our children, have access to the same American Dream I fought for. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Brigid Godfrey
subject: 🗓️ 30 Days To The Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/FVA-logo-05.png]
Peter,
There’s 30 days until the election in Virginia!
This November, affordability is on the line for everyday, hardworking Virginian families. It is up to us to vote for economic freedom champions who will pass a prescription drug affordability board, and will make sure public education thrives. Can you commit to voting today?
Head to IWillVote.com [https://iwillvote.com/] and make a plan for voting in the November 7th general election!
Whether you choose to vote by mail, early in-person, or on election day your vote matters. Here are some important dates to remember as we get closer to election day:
October 16th:
Deadline to register to vote or to update your voter registration.
Check your registration status here [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/registration/]
October 27th:
Deadline to apply for a ballot to be mailed to you.
Apply here [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/casting-a-ballot/early-absentee/]
October 28th:
Voter registration offices will be OPEN on Saturday for early voting
November 4th:
Last day of in-person early voting
November 7th:
Election day! Polls will be open from 6am to 7pm.
See you at the polls,
Brigid Godfrey

name: Dr. Anita Somani (via Ohio Dems)
subject: I’m an OB-GYN. I’m also a state representative here in Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
And I’m standing up for reproductive rights.
|
Team, Thursday, I stood with Ohio Democrats in support of Issue One, which would protect reproductive rights in the Ohio Constitution and prevent laws like the GOP’s extremist anti-abortion ban from taking effect. ****As an OB-GYN – as well as an Ohio state representative – I know firsthand exactly how important that protection is, which is why ****[I’m asking you right now to chip in and help fuel the fight for reproductive freedom ahead of Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71215754/431498760/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231008_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmVhZWFhNS0xZDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPilPXwlJIesaB7KfvVW27j48vtdabewmTOBT2mLVPo=)**** Issue One isn’t about politics, and it’s not even just about abortion access. It’s also about the right to IVF, contraception, and the right of all to make the healthcare and reproductive decisions that are right for us, without interference from the government or politicians with no medical experience or background. We’ve seen the consequences of such an extremist ban right here in Ohio. Last summer, when the GOP ban was in effect, physicians and patients weren’t sure what options they had. This led to a lot of confusion, and to patients being sent out of state for care – including a ten-year-old who needed abortion care. But during that same period, there were women in hospitals facing life-threatening situations, and doctors like myself and my colleagues faced with the prospect of losing their patient or their license. These are the same circumstances playing out in other states with such restrictions – like Idaho, where maternity centers are shutting down and doctors are leaving the state rather than come to a place where the care they could provide would be criminalized and their own ability to have a family impacted. I’m working every day to care for Ohio women and families. And the best prescription I can write is for Ohio to vote YES on Issue One by November 7. But time is running out, and it’s all hands on deck. So I’m asking, right now:** **[Will you pitch in $5 to help support the fight for reproductive healthcare and elect Democrats in Ohio who will stand up for our healthcare access and our fundamental rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71215755/431498761/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231008_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmVhZWFhNS0xZDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPilPXwlJIesaB7KfvVW27j48vtdabewmTOBT2mLVPo=)**** Thank you for standing up in this important fight. Dr. Anita Somani
OB-GYN
Ohio State Representative, HD 11 ** ** | ****A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →**** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71215756/431498762/-1291348375?refcode=odp_em_231008_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmVhZWFhNS0xZDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPilPXwlJIesaB7KfvVW27j48vtdabewmTOBT2mLVPo=) **

That’s 2% of ALL voters in Georgia

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71215863/431498998/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjliNjA5ZC0xZDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_T2osMNcrcaCJIpSIZmQAR_iO7YylTT9A0LA_wYZu_E=&emci=20737961-1d66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=629b609d-1d66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Brad Raffensperger purged 2% of all the voters in Georgia from the voter rolls. Now, if someone was accidentally on his list, _**they’ll get to the polls to find they can’t vote.**_

To give you context of just how big a deal this is, in 2020, Joe Biden won Georgia by just 11,779. Now there are 189,000 fewer voters registered in Georgia.

subject: an honor and privilege
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
My work is only possible through the incredible support of my grassroots supporters like you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71216268/431500449/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231008-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBjZWEyYi0yMDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CvOn2PXyul6E-m4XADN-ThHtpRK9P5jsc67JvUBt_g=)

| As we approach a closely contested 2024 election for this seat, I am reflecting on the last couple of years and what a journey it has been. There have been many challenges. After all, getting elected in a closely divided district like MI-03 is no cakewalk. However, what comes to mind is what an incredible privilege and joy my time running for and serving in Congress has been.

I have had the opportunity to connect with countless individuals across West Michigan. I have heard stories from every walk of life about their struggles and hardships, the things that keep them up at night. _**Those stories motivate me and energize me to continue my advocacy for the people of West Michigan.**_

Not only that, but I have seen firsthand the devastating rise of extremism in our backyard. My heart breaks to think of the many individuals working to dismantle the greatest American treasure, our tradition of Democracy. It is an honor to protect this tradition, and it is one of my life’s greatest passions as a firm believer in the sanctity of our constitution and Democratic system.

_**I am aware that what we know as politics is not all that optimistic. There’s a lot of division, chaos, and hate. But I am writing today to tell you I am full of hope and joy because those forces won’t win.**_ From my time campaigning and serving, I have seen firsthand how a handful of engaged and passionate individuals can make this country more inclusive and just. I promise to do my part to move us in the right direction. It is both my honor and privilege.

[_**My work is only possible through the incredible support of my grassroots supporters like you. I hope you will consider contributing any amount today so I can continue my work advocating for Democracy, West Michiganders, and progress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71216269/431500450/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231008-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBjZWEyYi0yMDY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7CvOn2PXyul6E-m4XADN-ThHtpRK9P5jsc67JvUBt_g=)

Hillary

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: The Cat's Out of the Bag
body:
Hi!

If this is your first time reading the weekly Lucci Letter, welcome! It’s
great to have you on the team as we campaign to Take Our Country Back in
Texas’ 25th US Congressional District. I'd love to hear from you, so hit
"reply" and let me know what's on your mind!

This last week, I joined my fellow Republicans at the Johnson County
Republican Volunteers Steering Committee on Monday. With the 14 Texas State
Constitutional Amendments on the ballot in November, it's very important
for us to get out into the community and get voters out to the polls in
defense of our Conservative values.
[image: JCRV.PNG]
JCRV Steering Committee Meeting

On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of speaking with the Reagan Legacy
Republican Women in Mansfield. I highlighted why I'm running for Congress,
how fentanyl is ravaging our community while Congress has failed to secure
the border, and why we need to Take Our Country Back. I also had another
opportunity to speak with Roger Williams' staff about setting up a debate.
I offered to debate him anytime, anywhere, and he still refused. He doesn't
want to face any opposition, and doesn't want to defend his record. It's
obvious that he cares more about what the establishment wants than what we
want.

[image: RLRW.PNG]
Speaking with the Reagan Legacy Republican Women in Mansfield

I joined a group in Arlington on Wednesday for a discussion on fighting
for our freedoms and holding elected officials accountable. Unfortunately,
many of our elected officials don't want to face us after the election.
>From school boards to Congress, we have folks in power who seem to think
that we're not good enough for them. They make it hard for us to get
answers, duck our calls, and even refuse to debate with conservative
candidates like me. (If you've been keeping up with our efforts to set up a
debate with Roger Williams, you know what I'm talking about.) In spite of
this, I'm proud that we have conservative patriots that refuse to be
silenced, and continue to stand up for what's right.

[image: Freedom Fighters.PNG]
David Jarvis speaking about his filed grievances with Arlington ISD

It looks like the cat's out of the bag with our dates and locations for the
Take Our Country Back Tour. If you haven't seen it yet, here is
the schedule for the 12-Day tour!

[image: Take Our Country Back Tour.png]

We're packing the schedule with events, meetings, block walking, touring
local businesses, and more. I would love to highlight local leaders and
businesses as we go throughout the district. If there's anyone that you
think that I should be meeting with, please let me know! One of those
events is a fundraising picnic on the 17th. I'd love to have you there!
Just Reply to this email to RSVP or contact Sean@LucciForTexas.com

[image: Fundraising Letter 1.png]
You're invited to our October 17th fundraiser!

Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the
future of our country.

God Bless You!
[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*

--
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
LucciForTexas@gmail.com
(682) 220-9925
*www.LucciForTexas.com <http://www.luccifortexas.com/>*

With the 14 Texas State Constitutional Amendments on the ballot in November, it's very important for us to get out into the community and get voters out to the polls in defense of our Conservative values. [image: JCRV.PNG] JCRV Steering Committee Meeting On Tuesday, I had the pleasure of speaking with the Reagan Legacy Republican Women in Mansfield. I highlighted why I'm running for Congress, how fentanyl is ravaging our community while Congress has failed to secure the border, and why we need to Take Our Country Back. I also had another opportunity to speak with Roger Williams' staff about setting up a debate. I offered to debate him anytime, anywhere, and he still refused. He doesn't want to face any opposition, and doesn't want to defend his record. It's obvious that he cares more about what the establishment wants than what we want. [image: RLRW.PNG] Speaking with the Reagan Legacy Republican Women in Mansfield I joined a group in Arlington on Wednesday for a discussion on fighting for our freedoms and holding elected officials accountable. Unfortunately, many of our elected officials don't want to face us after the election. From school boards to Congress, we have folks in power who seem to think that we're not good enough for them. They make it hard for us to get answers, duck our calls, and even refuse to debate with conservative candidates like me. (If you've been keeping up with our efforts to set up a debate with Roger Williams, you know what I'm talking about.) In spite of this, I'm proud that we have conservative patriots that refuse to be silenced, and continue to stand up for what's right. [image: Freedom Fighters.PNG] David Jarvis speaking about his filed grievances with Arlington ISD It looks like the cat's out of the bag with our dates and locations for the Take Our Country Back Tour. If you haven't seen it yet, here is the schedule for the 12-Day tour! [image: Take Our Country Back Tour.png] We're packing the schedule with events, meetings, block walking, touring local businesses, and more. I would love to highlight local leaders and businesses as we go throughout the district. If there's anyone that you think that I should be meeting with, please let me know! One of those events is a fundraising picnic on the 17th. I'd love to have you there! Just Reply to this email to RSVP or contact Sean@LucciForTexas.com [image: Fundraising Letter 1.png] You're invited to our October 17th fundraiser! Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the future of our country. God Bless You! [image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png] PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know. -- -- Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25 LucciForTexas@gmail.com (682) 220-9925 www.LucciForTexas.com <>

But with every month that passes, Washington Republicans double down on their efforts to flip this seat.

They’ve started to throw everything they got – from misleading attack ads to dishonest billboards – to deceive folks like you on my record of fighting for change. So it couldn’t be more clear that I’m going to need you by my side in order to win in November.

**That’s why, today, I’m asking for $5.[It may not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, the money adds up in a meaningful way. subject: Help me get on the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

I need your help getting on the August 2024 Republican primary ballot!

As you know, I have filed to run for State Senate in Legislative District 2 (LD2).

We are asking all registered Republicans and Independents in LD2 to sign my online nomination petition to get my name on the ballot.
---
| [Sign Bolick's Petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=08b1de1076&e=a7ab36849c "Sign Bolick's Petition")
---
| This is the map of our district:
---
|
---
| Please reach out to your like-minded conservative friends and family today to see if they will join you in helping us get on the ballot.

**Please forward them this email and encourage them to sign for Shawnna Bolick for State Senate**.
---
| I have been very energized by your support and deeply grateful. The team in LD2 we’re building to win this contested primary will prepare our slate of candidates to win the general election so we can maintain the majority in the Arizona Legislature.

I’m confident we can prevail, but we need your help today. Thank you for supporting our campaign today by helping me get on the ballot!

For Arizona,
---
|
---
| Shawnna Bolick
---
| [Send Me Back to the Senate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=628c076546&e=a7ab36849c "Send Me Back to the Senate")

---
| **ICYMI:

Upcoming Campaign Events**

**10/18/2023 Campaign Kickoff at 5:30pm**

Please reply to this email with your RSVP(s) so we can send you the address of where the event will be taking place.

If you have already RSVP'd for this event, we already received your RSVP and will be sending out an address shortly with the address. Thank you!

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: I am writing to ask you to contribute $5 directly to Jon Tester’s campaign. If he loses, Democrats lose the Senate. And we all have a role to play in making sure that does not happen.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Democratic Senator Jon Tester is running for re-election in what may be the most important Senate race of the entire cycle.

Friends -
Democratic Senator Jon Tester is running for re-election in what may be the most important Senate race of the entire cycle.
His seat is one of the most likely to flip to Republicans, he is already facing relentless attacks, and if he loses this race Democrats are likely to lose the Senate.
So he needs our help. Before he falls behind and can't catch up. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, directly to his campaign:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Tester**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-tester?refcode=em231008&refcode2=1608_4767699_pU3f2o&akid=1608%2E4767699%2EpU3f2o)
A lot of people ask if $5 can make a real difference in what will be an expensive race.
The answer is yes — every $5 matters, especially because it all adds up when we're all chipping in. That's why I am asking:
$5 for Jon Tester because he is leading by a few points in the polls today, but is the number one target of Republicans this cycle.
$5 for Jon Tester because if he loses this race, Democrats probably lose the Senate and we all have a role to play in making sure that doesn't happen.
$5 for Jon Tester because your donation will go a long way in a state like Montana — and especially that early money before the outside spending really picks up.
By the time you get to this point of my email, a lot of people have chipped in their $5. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because that's how Jon Tester will win re-election: by all of us working together.
[**Please use this link to contribute $5 directly to Jon Tester's re-election campaign for United States Senate in Montana. It all adds up fast when we all do our parts.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-tester?refcode=em231008&refcode2=1608_4767699_pU3f2o&akid=1608%2E4767699%2EpU3f2o)
The future is not something to witness — it's something we need to manifest. And when Jon Tester wins this race, know you did your part today.
Gavin Newsom
[CONTRIBUTE TO JON TESTER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-tester?refcode=em231008&refcode2=1608_4767699_pU3f2o&akid=1608%2E4767699%2EpU3f2o)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1608%2E4767699%2EpU3f2o).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A tidbit about me…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We need a new generation of leaders who think differently, work harder, and never forget that we are public servants.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)

Friends --
An open Senate seat in Michigan is a rare opportunity. With the retirement of the great Senator Debbie Stabenow, Republicans will be doing everything they can to win this swing seat and control of the Senate.
I’m running for Senate because we need a new generation of leaders who think differently, work harder, and _never forget_ that we are public servants. Being of service to the American people means bringing passionate, pragmatic leadership to Washington.
Service is something I’ve done my entire adult life -- first in the CIA, where I served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military, and later at the White House, State Department, and finally at the Pentagon, as an appointee of President Obama. Thanks to people like you, I’ve served two full terms in Congress, winning three extremely competitive elections in a Republican district.
[**A contribution of $3 or more today will help us show everyone we'll have what it takes to win this election. Please chip in today to help us raise the resources we need to win in this notorious swing state.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/925?c0=ebs-em-oct23.0NJIJF&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=2&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=3&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
But separate from my national security background, what motivated me to first run in 2018 was much more personal -- my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 -- and she didn't have health insurance at the time. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience -- of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork -- fueled me to run when the GOP threatened protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
Now Republicans want to put Social Security and Medicare on the same chopping block. Prescription drug costs continue to spiral out of control, and many have to choose between life-saving medicine and their rent or food. We are not settled, as a nation, on access to healthcare and this issue requires real change in Washington. By winning this Senate seat, we’ll help ensure that Democrats retain the majority and can pass legislation that expands access to healthcare.
[**Congress desperately needs a new approach to leadership. I would be the youngest Democratic woman in the Senate, if elected. Your contribution of $3 or more today will help us make sure everyone knows what’s at stake in this election.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/925?c0=ebs-em-oct23.0NJIJF&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=4&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=23&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23.1KsVSv&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=24&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-oct23.bbeHIu&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=25&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-oct23.fqQJeL&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=26&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-oct23.oc0oAM&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=27&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-oct23.GGwPD1&refcode=em231008-1-30&t=28&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj)**
---
****
Thank you. I’m committed to doing everything in my power to be the principled leader that you deserve.
Onward!
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=730%2E135344%2EfFQzJj).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

body:
This should not be a political issue. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71217522/431504288/-1346134463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA4YmQwOWQwLTJkNjYtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9gCQoq9Cl6gB4R-f4B8Yv4Snt55i-JC64z2TyDUKLQ0=)** Peter, Our national security relies on giving Ukraine the resources they need to win the war against Russia. They can’t win this war without our support. That’s why it’s so insane that MAGA Republicans are holding Ukraine funding hostage for selfish political reasons. Their extremism is making America less safe. Friend,
My first weekly deadline of October is in less than 15 hours. We’re statistically _**tied**_ with Rick Scott in a recent poll, so we need to show strong fundraising numbers to make sure he can’t pull ahead of us. _But right now, we’re $12,119 short of my $75,000 goal._

I came to this country as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, and my mom worked double shifts to pay the bills. I got a job at the local doughnut shop to help her make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71217871/431505704/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWRlNjc3MWUtMmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ED8rREBcknBU4DTUfsBOgYV_Q7d8SsalZVrICyq4t_c=)
I’ve seen firsthand just how difficult it is for working families to get by. **But I’ve also seen the incredible opportunities that are only possible in America.**
I was able to attend college, give back to my community, and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. And, after years of long shifts and late night classes to learn English, my mom was able to retire with dignity thanks to Social Security and Medicare.
Make no mistake: There’s a lot of work that we have to do to make sure that every family has the chance to achieve their American Dream. That’s why I’m running for Senate — to protect and expand the opportunities that made my story possible.
I’m running against Rick Scott, who’s spent his career attacking those opportunities and threatening vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. He has a personal fortune of up to a quarter of a billion dollars to fund his campaign. **I’m counting on a grassroots army made up of people like you to fight back.**

name: Josh Harder
subject: Good news and bad news
body:
California wildfires. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71217992/431506144/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBmN2U2YjUtMmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qn8XornAq1q_kqSsh9ANXc1jQhSs5LtO_6KwuOIQftE=) | Peter, Today I want to give you an update on an important issue I’m fighting for in Washington. It’s only going to take a minute, so I hope you’ll keep reading. At the same time our country was facing a government shutdown, wildland firefighters (aka the ones on the frontline protecting us in California) were facing a massive pay cut if funding wasn’t extended. It was about to be a disaster. Experts predicted we could see 50% of our wildland firefighters resign if the pay cut was allowed to occur. They’d literally be paid less than California’s minimum wage of $15/hour! So the update is good and bad news. **The good news:** because of the CR funding bill Democrats and I passed, we got a 45 day extension on firefighter pay funding. **The bad news:** We only have 42 days until the temporary extension we just passed expires and we’re at the same place we were a week ago - and the Republicans don’t even have a Speaker right now! [_**That’s why I’m asking for your support: Will you add your name to my petition and tell Congress not to cut firefighter pay here in California?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71217993/431506145/87889861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBmN2U2YjUtMmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qn8XornAq1q_kqSsh9ANXc1jQhSs5LtO_6KwuOIQftE=&emci=3bf7e6b5-2f66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=40f7e6b5-2f66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71217994/431506146/87889861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBmN2U2YjUtMmY2Ni1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qn8XornAq1q_kqSsh9ANXc1jQhSs5LtO_6KwuOIQftE=&emci=3bf7e6b5-2f66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=40f7e6b5-2f66-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6455652) This should be common sense. \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Your early investment and support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. clean_body: California wildfires. | = | Peter, Today I want to give you an update on an important issue I’m fighting for in Washington. It’s only going to take a minute, so I hope you’ll keep reading. At the same time our country was facing a government shutdown, wildland firefighters (aka the ones on the frontline protecting us in California) were facing a massive pay cut if funding wasn’t extended. It was about to be a disaster. Experts predicted we could see 50% of our wildland firefighters resign if the pay cut was allowed to occur. They’d literally be paid less than California’s minimum wage of $15/hour! So the update is good and bad news. The good news: because of the CR funding bill Democrats and I passed, we got a 45 day extension on firefighter pay funding. The bad news: We only have 42 days until the temporary extension we just passed expires and we’re at the same place we were a week ago - and the Republicans don’t even have a Speaker right now! This should be common sense. \- Josh *

body:
We are just hours away from the most important deadline our campaign has faced yet. Hey Peter – we wanted to reach out one last time before our midnight deadline.

This 30-day pre-general reporting deadline is the most important one we've faced yet. This is one of our last chances to send a message to Cameron and his allies that their lies aren't working and Kentuckians are fired up for four more years of progress.

We're hoping for one final push to help us close out the reporting period on a strong note. Can we count on your support? **[Read Andy's note below, then chip in before our 30-day pre-general reporting deadline at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71218138/431506739/1286826882?refcode=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3a3a999c-3266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNhOTk5Yy0zMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isunLjdGJGwBDBE2vn50IK4POgV35GcliMfPSNat7xw=)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Andy (personal)
Subject: 30 days until Election Day
Date: Sunday, October 8, 2023

Hey folks,

Tonight at midnight is our 30-day pre-general reporting deadline. In a moment, I'm going to share some important updates on this race, but first, I have to ask:

Will you chip in before midnight to help us close out this reporting period on a strong note and ensure we have the resources we need to win this tough race? Here's a link for you to donate → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?refcode2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71218140/431506746/1286826882?refcode=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3a3a999c-3266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNhOTk5Yy0zMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isunLjdGJGwBDBE2vn50IK4POgV35GcliMfPSNat7xw=)

With just 30 days until Election Day, this remains the most competitive race in the entire country. _Politico_ is calling the match-up between me and my opponent, Daniel Cameron, "dramatically close."

That's why I haven't been surprised to see Cameron and his allies pouring millions into this race. They're spreading false, nasty lies about me and my record to try to deceive Kentuckians and buy this race.

Finishing this reporting period strongly is critical to ensuring we have what it takes to fight back against any attack that comes our way and continue reaching Kentuckians with our plan to protect our progress. But I can't do it without you, team.

Please chip in before midnight to help me take Cameron and his outside spending allies so we can continue to move Kentucky forward. → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?refcode2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71218147/431506753/1286826882?refcode=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231008_dline8_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3a3a999c-3266-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNhOTk5Yy0zMjY2LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isunLjdGJGwBDBE2vn50IK4POgV35GcliMfPSNat7xw=)

Thank you,

Andy

subject: Josh Hawley has made a whole career of controlling other people’s lives

body:
We’re going to make him pay for it next year.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley has made a whole career out of trying to control other people’s lives — and in 2024, we’re going to make him pay for it:

subject: FWD: Planned Parenthood Endorsement →

body:
Friends,
I am humbled by Planned Parenthood's official endorsement of my campaign. Winning races like this is a team effort, and knowing that Planned Parenthood believes in my record and knows I can keep pushing forward their values in Congress means everything.
I’m bumping the email my team sent out the other day, and I’m asking you to chip in anything you can to help us build off the momentum of this endorsement. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn-pp?refcode=231008-email]
Together, we can continue the fight for accessible health care, reproductive freedom, and the right to choose.
Thank you,
Wiley
